Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT SUM(COL1) FILTER (WHERE COL2 > 300),
       AVG(COL2) FILTER (WHERE COL2 < 50)
FROM MyTable WHERE COL3 > 50
```

Copy

```
SELECT SUM(COL1) FILTER (WHERE COL1 IS NOT NULL)
FROM MyTable WHERE COL3 > 50
```

Copy

```
SELECT ARRAY_AGG(firstName, 'STRING', true) AS firstNames
FROM transcript;
```

Copy

```
firstNames
-----------
["Bob", "Nick", "Lucy"]
```

Copy

```
SELECT ARRAY_AGG(tags, 'STRING') AS allTags
FROM articles;
```

Copy

```
allTags
-------------------------------------
["news", "ai", "pinot", "open-source"]
```

Copy

```
LISTAGG(dataColumn [, delimiter] [, isDistinct])
```

Copy

```
SELECT LISTAGG(firstName, ', ', true) AS allNames
FROM transcript;
```

Copy

```
allNames
-------------------
Bob, Nick, Lucy
```

Copy

```
SELECT LISTAGG(tags, '|') AS tagList
FROM articles;
```

Copy

```
tagList
------------------------
news|ai|pinot|open-source
```

Copy

```
sumArrayLong(arrayColumn)
```

Copy

```
SELECT sumArrayLong(values) AS totalSum
FROM metrics;
```

Copy

```
values
-------
[1, 2, 3]
[4, 5, 6]
```

Copy

```
totalSum
---------
21
```

Copy

```
SELECT category, sumArrayLong(values) AS total
FROM metrics
GROUP BY category;
```

Copy

```
category | total
----------|------
A         | 15
B         | 27
```

Copy

```
sumArrayDouble(arrayColumn)
```

Copy

```
SELECT sumArrayDouble(weights) AS totalWeight
FROM model_output;
```

Copy

```
weights
------------
[1.2, 0.8]
[2.5, 3.0]
```

Copy

```
totalWeight
------------
7.5
```

Copy

```
SELECT experimentId, sumArrayDouble(scores) AS totalScore
FROM results
GROUP BY experimentId;
```

Copy

```
SELECT filterMv(stringArrayCol, 'REGEXP_LIKE(v, ''^/api/.*'')')
FROM myTable
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayReverseInt(ARRAY[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
-- Result: [5, 4, 3, 2, 1]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayReverseString(ARRAY['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']);
-- Result: ['cherry', 'banana', 'apple']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySortInt(ARRAY[4, 1, 3, 5, 2]);
-- Result: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySortString(ARRAY['banana', 'apple', 'cherry']);
-- Result: ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexOfInt(ARRAY[10, 20, 3, 40], 3);
-- Result: 2
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexOfString(ARRAY['apple', 'banana', 'cherry'], 'cherry');
-- Result: 2
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexesOfInt(ARRAY[5, 3, 5, 2, 5], 5);
-- Result: [0, 2, 4]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexesOfLong(ARRAY[5000000000, 3000000000, 5000000000], 5000000000);
-- Result: [0, 2]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexesOfFloat(ARRAY[1.5, 3.0, 1.5], 1.5);
-- Result: [0, 2]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexesOfDouble(ARRAY[123.456, 789.012, 123.456], 123.456);
-- Result: [0, 2]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayIndexesOfString(ARRAY['a', 'b', 'a'], 'a');
-- Result: [0, 2]
```

Copy

```
SELECT intersectIndices(ARRAY[1, 3, 5], ARRAY[3, 5]);
-- Result: [3, 5]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraysOverlap(ARRAY[1, 3, 5], ARRAY[3, 5]);
-- Result: true
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayContainsInt(ARRAY[3, 7, 9], 7);
-- Result: true
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayContainsString(ARRAY['apple', 'banana'], 'apple');
-- Result: true
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySliceInt(ARRAY[10, 20, 30, 40], 1, 3);
-- Result: [20, 30]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySliceLong(ARRAY[10000000000, 20000000000, 30000000000, 40000000000], 1, 3);
-- Result: [20000000000, 30000000000]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySliceString(ARRAY['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'], 0, 2);
-- Result: ['a', 'b']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayDistinctInt(ARRAY[1, 2, 2, 3, 1]);
-- Result: [1, 2, 3]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayDistinctString(ARRAY['apple', 'banana', 'apple']);
-- Result: ['apple', 'banana']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayRemoveInt(ARRAY[2, 4, 2, 6], 2);
-- Result: [4, 2, 6]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayRemoveString(ARRAY['apple', 'banana', 'cherry'], 'banana');
-- Result: ['apple', 'cherry']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayUnionInt(ARRAY[1, 2], ARRAY[2, 3]);
-- Result: [1, 2, 3]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayUnionString(ARRAY['a', 'b'], ARRAY['b', 'c']);
-- Result: ['a', 'b', 'c']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayConcatInt(ARRAY[1, 2], ARRAY[3, 4]);
-- Result: [1, 2, 3, 4]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayConcatLong(ARRAY[1000000000, 2000000000], ARRAY[3000000000]);
-- Result: [1000000000, 2000000000, 3000000000]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayConcatFloat(ARRAY[1.5, 2.0], ARRAY[3.5]);
-- Result: [1.5, 2.0, 3.5]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayConcatDouble(ARRAY[123.456], ARRAY[789.012]);
-- Result: [123.456, 789.012]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayConcatString(ARRAY['a', 'b'], ARRAY['c']);
-- Result: ['a', 'b', 'c']
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayPushBackInt(intArray, 7)
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayPushBackString(stringArray, 'x')
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayPushFrontInt(intArray, 7)
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayPushFrontString(stringArray, 'x')
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayElementAtInt(ARRAY[10, 20, 30], 2);
-- Result: 20
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayElementAtLong(ARRAY[1000000000, 2000000000], 1);
-- Result: 1000000000
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayElementAtFloat(ARRAY[1.5, 2.0], 2);
-- Result: 2.0
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayElementAtDouble(ARRAY[123.456, 789.012], 1);
-- Result: 123.456
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayElementAtString(ARRAY['alpha', 'beta', 'gamma'], 1);
-- Result: 'alpha'
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySumInt(ARRAY[1, 2, 3, 4]);
-- Result: 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT arraySumLong(ARRAY[1000000000, 2000000000]);
-- Result: 3000000000
```

Copy

```
SELECT array(1, 2, 3) AS int_array, array('a', 'b') AS str_array;
-- Result:
-- int_array = [1, 2, 3]
-- str_array = ['a', 'b']
```

Copy

```
SELECT generateIntArray(1, 5, 2);
-- Result: [1, 3, 5]
```

Copy

```
SELECT generateLongArray(100, 300, 100);
-- Result: [100, 200, 300]
```

Copy

```
SELECT generateFloatArray(0.5, 2.0, 0.5);
-- Result: [0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0]
```

Copy

```
SELECT generateDoubleArray(1.0, 2.5, 0.5);
-- Result: [1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5]
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayToString(ARRAY['red', 'green', 'blue'], ',');
-- Result: 'red,green,blue'
```

Copy

```
SELECT arrayToString(ARRAY['foo', NULL, 'bar'], '|', 'NA');
-- Result: 'foo|NA|bar'
```

```
toEpochSecondsMV(millisArray)

SELECT toEpochMinutes(1700000000000) FROM myTable
-- Returns 28333333
```

```

```

Copy

```
toEpochHours(millis)

Copy

```
SELECT toEpochHours(1700000000000) FROM myTable

```

Copy

```
fromIso8601(iso8601)
```

Copy

```
SELECT fromIso8601('2023-08-20T13:00:00Z') FROM myTable
-- Returns 1692536400000
```

Copy

```
fromIso8601MV(iso8601Array)
```

Copy

```
toIso8601(millis)
```

Copy

```
SELECT toIso8601(1692536400000) FROM myTable
-- Returns '2023-08-20T13:00:00Z'
```

Copy

```
toIso8601MV(millisArray)
```

Copy

```
toTimestamp(millis)
```

Copy

```
SELECT toTimestamp(1700000000000) FROM myTable
-- Returns TIMESTAMP '2023-11-14 22:13:20.000'
```

Copy

```
toTimestampMV(millisArray)
```

Copy

```
fromTimestamp(timestamp)
```

Copy

```
SELECT fromTimestamp(TIMESTAMP '2023-11-14 22:13:20.000') FROM myTable
-- Returns 1700000000000
```

Copy

```
fromTimestampMV(timestampArray)
```

Copy

```
toDateTime(millis, pattern)
```

Copy

```
SELECT toDateTime(1700000000000, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') FROM myTable
-- Returns '2023-11-14 22:13:20'
```

Copy

```
toDateTimeMV(millisArray, pattern)
```

Copy

```
toDateTime(millis, pattern, timezoneId)
```

Copy

```
SELECT toDateTime(1700000000000, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', 'America/New_York') FROM myTable
-- Returns '2023-11-14 17:13:20'
```

Copy

```
toDateTimeMV(millisArray, pattern, timezoneId)
```

Copy

```
fromDateTime(dateTimeString, pattern)
```

Copy

```
SELECT fromDateTime('2023-11-14 22:13:20', 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') FROM myTable
-- Returns 1700000000000
```

Copy

```
fromDateTimeMV(dateTimeArray, pattern)
```

Copy

```
fromDateTime(dateTimeString, pattern, timeZoneId)
```

Copy

```
fromDateTime(dateTimeString, pattern, timeZoneId, defaultVal)
```

Copy

```
fromDateTimeMV(dateTimeArray, pattern, timeZoneId)
```

Copy

```
round(timeValue, roundToNearest)
```

Copy

```
SELECT round(1700000000123, 1000) FROM myTable
-- Returns 1700000000000
```

Copy

```
roundMV(timeArray, roundToNearest)
```

Copy

```
now()
```

Copy

```
SELECT now() FROM myTable
-- Returns something like 1700000000000
```

Copy

```
sleep(millis)
```

Copy

```
ago(periodString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ago('PT1H') FROM myTable
-- Returns current time minus one hour in millis
```

Copy

```
agoMV(periodArray)
```

Copy

```
timezoneHour(timezoneId)
```

Copy

```
SELECT timezoneHour('America/New_York') FROM myTable
-- Returns -5 or -4 depending on DST
```

Copy

```
timezoneHourMV(timezoneIdArray)
```

Copy

```
timezoneHour(timezoneId, millis)
```

Copy

```
timezoneHourMV(timezoneId, millisArray)
```

Copy

```
timezoneMinute(timezoneId)
```

Copy

```
timezoneMinuteMV(timezoneIdArray)
```

Copy

```
timezoneMinute(timezoneId, millis)
```

Copy

```
timezoneMinuteMV(timezoneId, millisArray)
```

Copy

```
year(millis)
```

Copy

```
year(millis, timezoneId)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dayOfWeekMV([1700000000000, 1700003600000], 'America/Los_Angeles')
-- Returns [3, 3] if both fall on the same Wednesday in that time zone.
```

Copy

```
extract(interval, timestamp)
```

Copy

```
SELECT extract('YEAR', 1700000000000)
-- Returns: 2023

SELECT extract('MONTH', 1700000000000)
-- Returns: 11

SELECT extract('DOW', 1700000000000)
-- Returns: 3 (Wednesday, if using ISO standard)
```

Copy

```
dateTrunc(unit, timeValue)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dateTrunc('minute', 1700001234567)
-- Returns 1700001180000 (start of the minute)

SELECT dateTrunc('day', 1700001234567)
-- Returns 1700000000000 (start of the day in UTC)
```

Copy

```
dateTrunc(unit, timeValue, inputTimeUnit)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dateTrunc('hour', 1700000000, 'SECONDS')
-- Returns 1700000000 (start of hour in seconds)

SELECT dateTrunc('day', 1700000000, 'SECONDS')
-- Returns: 1699910400 (start of day in seconds)
```

Copy

```
dateTrunc(unit, timeValue, inputTimeUnit, timezone)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dateTrunc('day', 1700000000000, 'MILLISECONDS', 'Asia/Kolkata')
-- Returns start of day in IST.
```

Copy

```
dateTrunc(unit, timeValue, inputTimeUnit, timezone, outputTimeUnit)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dateTrunc('month', 1700000000, 'SECONDS', 'America/New_York', 'SECONDS')
-- Returns start of the month in New York in seconds.
```

Copy

```
SELECT dateTruncMV('minute', [1700001234567, 1700001288888])
-- Returns [1700001180000, 1700001240000]
```

Copy

```
dateBin(binWidthStr, sourceTimestamp, originTimestamp)
```

Copy

```
-- Align 2024-01-01 12:37:00 to the nearest 15-minute bin from 2024-01-01 00:00:00
SELECT dateBin('PT15M', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 12:37:00', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00')
-- Returns: TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 12:30:00'

-- Align a time to the start of its 2-day bin
SELECT dateBin('P2D', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-03 10:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00')
-- Returns: TIMESTAMP '2024-01-03 00:00:00'

-- Align to 1-hour bins from a non-midnight origin
SELECT dateBin('PT1H', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 11:47:00', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 06:15:00')
-- Returns: TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 11:15:00'
```

Copy

```
timestampAdd(unit, interval, timestamp)
```

Copy

```
-- Add 3 days to the given timestamp
SELECT timestampAdd('days', 3, 1700000000000)

-- Subtract 6 hours
SELECT timestampAdd('hours', -6, 1700000000000)
```

Copy

```
SELECT timestampAddMV('days', 1, [1700000000000, 1700086400000])
-- Returns: [1700086400000, 1700172800000]
```

Copy

```
timestampDiff(unit, timestamp1, timestamp2)
```

Copy

```
-- Difference between two timestamps in days
SELECT timestampDiff('days', ago('10D'), ago('2D'))
-- Returns: 8
```

Copy

```
SELECT timestampDiffMV('hours', [1700000000000, 1700003600000], 1700010800000)
-- Returns: [3, 2]
```

Copy

```
SELECT timestampDiffMVReverse('days', 1700000000000, [1700086400000, 1700172800000])
-- Returns: [1, 2]
```

# ago

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT * 
FROM tableName
WHERE tsInMillis > ago('P1D')
```

<a id="functions-datetime-datetimeconvert"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/datetime/datetimeconvert -->

<!-- page_index: 10 -->

# DATETIMECONVERT

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:DAYS:EPOCH', 
         '1:DAYS'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:DAYS'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:DAYS',
         'Europe/Berlin'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '15:MINUTES'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:DAYS:SIMPLE_DATE_FORMAT:yyyy-MM-dd', 
         '1:DAYS'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:SIMPLE_DATE_FORMAT:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm tz(Pacific/Kiritimati)', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:SIMPLE_DATE_FORMAT:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm tz(Pacific/Kiritimati)', 
         '1:DAYS'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       DATETIMECONVERT(
         created_at_timestamp, 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:EPOCH', 
         '1:MILLISECONDS:SIMPLE_DATE_FORMAT:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm', 
         '1:DAYS',
         'Europe/Berlin'
       ) AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
WHERE id = 7044874134
```

<a id="functions-datetime-datetrunc"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/datetime/datetrunc -->

<!-- page_index: 11 -->

# DATETRUNC

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select dateTrunc('week', 1639480981746) AS ts
FROM ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
select dateTrunc('week', 1639480981746, 'MILLISECONDS') AS ts
FROM ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
select dateTrunc(
  'week', 
  1639480981746, 
  'MILLISECONDS', 
  'UTC', 
  'SECONDS'
) AS ts
FROM ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
select dateTrunc(
  'week', 
  1639480981746, 
  'MILLISECONDS', 
  'CET', 
  'SECONDS'
) AS ts
FROM ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
select dateTrunc(
  'quarter', 
  1639480981746, 
  'MILLISECONDS', 
  'America/Los_Angeles', 
  'HOURS'
) AS ts
FROM ignoreMe
```

<!-- page_index: 16 -->

# FromDateTime

- [Signature](#functions-datetime-fromdatetime--signature)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-datetime-fromdatetime--usage-examples)
- [DST Handling](#functions-datetime-fromdatetime--dst-handling)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT FromDateTime(
    '2019-08-07T07:12:13-0800', 
    'yyyy-MM-dd''T''HH:mm:ssZ'
    ) AS epochMillis
FROM ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
SELECT FromDateTime('2026-04-24', 'yyyy-MM-dd', 'Africa/Cairo') AS epochMillis
FROM ignoreMe
```

<a id="functions-datetime-timeconvert"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/datetime/timeconvert -->

<!-- page_index: 26 -->

# TIMECONVERT

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       TIMECONVERT(created_at_timestamp, 'MILLISECONDS', 'HOURS') AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
LIMIT 1
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       TIMECONVERT(created_at_timestamp, 'MILLISECONDS', 'SECONDS') AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
LIMIT 1
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       TIMECONVERT(created_at_timestamp, 'MILLISECONDS', 'MILLISECONDS') AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
LIMIT 1
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       TIMECONVERT(created_at_timestamp, 'MILLISECONDS', 'MICROSECONDS') AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
LIMIT 1
```

Copy

```
select id, 
       created_at_timestamp, 
       cast(created_at_timestamp AS long) AS timeInMs,
       TIMECONVERT(created_at_timestamp, 'MILLISECONDS', 'NANOSECONDS') AS convertedTime
from githubEvents
LIMIT 1
```

# Hash Functions

- [Non-Cryptographic Hash Functions](#functions-hash--non-cryptographic-hash-functions)
- [Notes](#functions-hash--notes)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SHA224(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT SHA224(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 'bb54d1095764bff72b570dcdc3172ed6d1b26695494528a0059c95ae'
```

Copy

```
SHA256(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT SHA256(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns '4acf0b39d9c4766709a3689f553ac01ab550545ffa4544dfc0b2cea82fba02a3'
```

Copy

```
SHA512(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT SHA512(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 'c48af5a7f6d4a851fc8a434eed638ab1a6ef68e19dbcae894ac67c9fbc5bcb0182b8e7123b3df3c9e4dcb7690c23103f03dc17f54352071ceb2a4eb204b26b91'
```

Copy

```
MD2(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MD2(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns '466c453913ba0d8325f96b2d47984fb5'
```

Copy

```
MD5(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MD5(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns '536788f4dbdffeecfbb8f350a941eea3'
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH2(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH2(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns -534425817
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH2UTF8(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH2UTF8('testString') FROM myTable
-- Returns -534425817
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH2BIT64(input)
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH2BIT64(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH2BIT64(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 3907736674355139845

SELECT MURMURHASH2BIT64(TO_UTF8('testString'), 12345) FROM myTable
-- Returns -2138976126980760436
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH3BIT32(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH3BIT32(TO_UTF8('testString'), 0) FROM myTable
-- Returns -1435605585
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH3BIT64(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH3BIT64(TO_UTF8('testString'), 0) FROM myTable
-- Returns -3652179990542706350
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH3BIT128(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH3BIT128(TO_UTF8('testString'), 0) FROM myTable
-- Returns byte array: [82, -103, -23, 15, -90, -39, 80, -51, 15, 73, -81, -28, 111, -21, -78, 108]
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH3X64BIT32(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH3X64BIT32(TO_UTF8('testString'), 0) FROM myTable
-- Returns -1096986291
```

Copy

```
MURMURHASH3X64BIT128(input, seed)
```

Copy

```
SELECT MURMURHASH3X64BIT128(TO_UTF8('testString'), 0) FROM myTable
-- Returns byte array: [-66, -99, 81, 77, -7, 29, 124, 76, 42, 38, -34, -42, -92, -83, 83, 13]
```

Copy

```
ADLER32(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ADLER32(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 392102968
```

Copy

```
CRC32(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT CRC32(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 418708744
```

Copy

```
CRC32C(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT CRC32C(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns -1608760557
```

Copy

```
FNV1HASH32(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1HASH32(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 123456789
```

Copy

```
FNV1HASH32UTF8(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1HASH32UTF8('testString') FROM myTable
-- Returns 123456789
```

Copy

```
FNV1AHASH32(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1AHASH32(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 987654321
```

Copy

```
FNV1AHASH32UTF8(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1AHASH32UTF8('testString') FROM myTable
-- Returns 987654321
```

Copy

```
FNV1HASH64(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1HASH64(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 1234567890123456789
```

Copy

```
FNV1HASH64UTF8(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1HASH64UTF8('testString') FROM myTable
-- Returns 1234567890123456789
```

Copy

```
FNV1AHASH64(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1AHASH64(TO_UTF8('testString')) FROM myTable
-- Returns 9876543210987654321
```

Copy

```
FNV1AHASH64UTF8(input)
```

Copy

```
SELECT FNV1AHASH64UTF8('testString') FROM myTable
-- Returns 9876543210987654321
```

<a id="functions-ip-address"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/ip-address -->

<!-- page_index: 39 -->

# IP Address Functions

- [isSubnetOf](#functions-ip-address--issubnetof)
- [ipPrefix](#functions-ip-address--ipprefix)
- [ipSubnetMin](#functions-ip-address--ipsubnetmin)
- [ipSubnetMax](#functions-ip-address--ipsubnetmax)
- [isIPv4String](#functions-ip-address--isipv4string)
- [isIPv6String](#functions-ip-address--isipv6string)
- [ipFamily / ip\_family](#functions-ip-address--ipfamily-ip_family)
- [ipv4ToLong](#functions-ip-address--ipv4tolong)
- [longToIpv4](#functions-ip-address--longtoipv4)
- [ipv6ToBytes](#functions-ip-address--ipv6tobytes)
- [bytesToIpv6](#functions-ip-address--bytestoipv6)
- [ipv4ToIpv6](#functions-ip-address--ipv4toipv6)
- [ipMaskLen / ip\_mask\_len](#functions-ip-address--ipmasklen-ip_mask_len)
- [ipNetmask / ip\_netmask](#functions-ip-address--ipnetmask-ip_netmask)
- [ipHostmask / ip\_hostmask](#functions-ip-address--iphostmask-ip_hostmask)
- [ipv4CIDRToRange](#functions-ip-address--ipv4cidrtorange)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
ipSubnetMin(ipPrefix)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipSubnetMin('192.168.1.0/24') AS range_start
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Returns '192.168.1.0'
```

Copy

```
ipSubnetMax(ipPrefix)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipSubnetMax('192.168.1.0/24') AS range_end
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Returns '192.168.1.255'
```

Copy

```
isIPv4String(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT isIPv4String('192.168.1.1') AS valid_v4
-- Returns true
```

Copy

```
isIPv6String(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT isIPv6String('2001:db8::1') AS valid_v6
-- Returns true
```

Copy

```
ipFamily(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipFamily('2001:db8::1') AS ip_version
-- Returns 6
```

Copy

```
ipv4ToLong(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipv4ToLong('192.168.1.1') AS ip_as_long
-- Returns 3232235777
```

Copy

```
longToIpv4(value)
```

Copy

```
SELECT longToIpv4(3232235777) AS ip_text
-- Returns '192.168.1.1'
```

Copy

```
ipv6ToBytes(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipv6ToBytes('2001:db8::1') AS ip_bytes
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
```

Copy

```
bytesToIpv6(bytes)
```

Copy

```
SELECT bytesToIpv6(ipv6ToBytes('2001:db8::1')) AS ip_text
-- Returns '2001:db8::1'
```

Copy

```
ipv4ToIpv6(ipString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipv4ToIpv6('192.168.1.1') AS mapped_ip
-- Returns '::ffff:c0a8:101'
```

Copy

```
ipMaskLen(cidr)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipMaskLen('192.168.1.0/24') AS prefix_len
-- Returns 24
```

Copy

```
ipNetmask(cidr)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipNetmask('192.168.1.0/24') AS netmask
-- Returns '255.255.255.0'
```

Copy

```
ipHostmask(cidr)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipHostmask('192.168.1.0/24') AS hostmask
-- Returns '0.0.0.255'
```

Copy

```
ipv4CIDRToRange(cidr)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ipv4CIDRToRange('192.168.1.0/24') AS ip_range
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Returns ['192.168.1.0', '192.168.1.255']
```

<a id="functions-json"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/json -->

<!-- page_index: 40 -->

# JSON Functions

- [Transform Functions](#functions-json--transform-functions)
- [Scalar Functions](#functions-json--scalar-functions)
- [Additional Reference Pages](#functions-json--additional-reference-pages)
- [More Examples](#functions-json--more-examples)
- [JSON\_MATCH and JSON\_EXTRACT\_SCALAR](#functions-json--json_match-and-json_extract_scalar)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
Table myTable:
  id        INTEGER
  jsoncolumn    JSON 

Table data:
101,{"name":{"first":"daffy"\,"last":"duck"}\,"score":101\,"data":["a"\,"b"\,"c"\,"d"]}
102,{"name":{"first":"donald"\,"last":"duck"}\,"score":102\,"data":["a"\,"b"\,"e"\,"f"]}
103,{"name":{"first":"mickey"\,"last":"mouse"}\,"score":103\,"data":["a"\,"b"\,"g"\,"h"]}
104,{"name":{"first":"minnie"\,"last":"mouse"}\,"score":104\,"data":["a"\,"b"\,"i"\,"j"]}
105,{"name":{"first":"goofy"\,"last":"dwag"}\,"score":104\,"data":["a"\,"b"\,"i"\,"j"]}
106,{"person":{"name":"daffy duck"\,"companies":[{"name":"n1"\,"title":"t1"}\,{"name":"n2"\,"title":"t2"}]}}
107,{"person":{"name":"scrooge mcduck"\,"companies":[{"name":"n1"\,"title":"t1"}\,{"name":"n2"\,"title":"t2"}]}}
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsoncolumn 
  FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT id,
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null') last_name,
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.first', 'STRING', 'null') first_name
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.data[1]', 'STRING', 'null') value
  FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT id,
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null') last_name,
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.first', 'STRING', 'null') first_name,
       json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.data[1]', 'STRING', 'null') value
  FROM myTable
 WHERE JSON_MATCH(jsoncolumn, '"$.data[1]" IS NOT NULL')
```

Copy

```
  SELECT json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null') last_name,
         count(*)
    FROM myTable
   WHERE JSON_MATCH(jsoncolumn, '"$.data[1]" IS NOT NULL')
GROUP BY json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null')
ORDER BY 2 DESC
```

Copy

```
  SELECT json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null') last_name,
         sum(json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.id', 'INT', 0)) total
    FROM myTable
   WHERE JSON_MATCH(jsoncolumn, '"$.name.last" IS NOT NULL')
GROUP BY json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null')
```

Copy

```
  SELECT json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null') last_name,
         json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.id', 'INT', 0) total
    FROM myTable
   WHERE JSON_MATCH(jsoncolumn, '"$.data[*]" = ''f''')
GROUP BY json_extract_scalar(jsoncolumn, '$.name.last', 'STRING', 'null')
```

Copy

```
data[0] IN ('k', 'j')
```

Copy

```
"data[0]" IN ('k', 'j')
```

Copy

```
"data[0]" IN (''k'', ''j'')
```

Copy

```
'"data[0]" IN (''k'', ''j'')'
```

Copy

```
   WHERE JSON_MATCH(jsoncolumn, '"data[0]" IN (''k'', ''j'')')
```

<a id="functions-null-handling"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/null-handling -->

<!-- page_index: 43 -->

# Null Handling Functions

- [isNull](#functions-null-handling--isnull)
- [isNotNull](#functions-null-handling--isnotnull)
- [isDistinctFrom](#functions-null-handling--isdistinctfrom)
- [isNotDistinctFrom](#functions-null-handling--isnotdistinctfrom)
- [coalesce](#functions-null-handling--coalesce)
- [caseWhen](#functions-null-handling--casewhen)
- [nullIf](#functions-null-handling--nullif)
- [AND](#functions-null-handling--and)
- [OR](#functions-null-handling--or)
- [NOT](#functions-null-handling--not)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
isDistinctFrom(col1, col2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT isDistinctFrom(oldPrice, newPrice) AS price_changed
FROM priceHistory
LIMIT 10
-- Returns false when both are null, true when only one is null
```

Copy

```
isNotDistinctFrom(col1, col2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT isNotDistinctFrom(shippingAddr, billingAddr) AS same_address
FROM orders
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
coalesce(col1, col2, col3, ...)
```

Copy

```
SELECT coalesce(preferredName, firstName, 'Unknown') AS displayName
FROM users
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
CASE WHEN condition1 THEN result1
     WHEN condition2 THEN result2
     ELSE defaultResult
END
```

Copy

```
SELECT orderId,
       CASE WHEN total > 1000 THEN 'premium'
            WHEN total > 100 THEN 'standard'
            ELSE 'basic'
       END AS tier
FROM orders
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
nullIf(value1, value2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT nullIf(status, 'N/A') AS status
FROM events
LIMIT 10
-- Returns null when status is 'N/A', otherwise returns the status value
```

Copy

```
bool_col1 AND bool_col2
```

Copy

```
SELECT *
FROM orders
WHERE isPaid AND isShipped
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
bool_col1 OR bool_col2
```

Copy

```
SELECT *
FROM orders
WHERE isPaid OR isCOD
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
NOT bool_col
```

Copy

```
SELECT *
FROM orders
WHERE NOT isCancelled
LIMIT 10
```

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
STDDEV_POP(col)
```

Copy

```
SELECT STDDEV_POP(latency) AS latency_stddev
FROM requestMetrics
```

Copy

```
STDDEV_SAMP(col)
```

Copy

```
SELECT STDDEV_SAMP(revenue) AS revenue_stddev
FROM salesData
```

Copy

```
COVAR_POP(col1, col2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT COVAR_POP(adSpend, revenue) AS spend_revenue_covariance
FROM campaignMetrics
```

Copy

```
COVAR_SAMP(col1, col2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT COVAR_SAMP(temperature, energyUsage) AS temp_energy_covariance
FROM sensorData
```

Copy

```
SKEWNESS(col)
```

Copy

```
SELECT SKEWNESS(orderAmount) AS amount_skewness
FROM orders
```

Copy

```
KURTOSIS(col)
```

Copy

```
SELECT KURTOSIS(responseTime) AS latency_kurtosis
FROM apiMetrics
```

- [radians](#functions-trigonometric--radians)

FROM myTable

-- Returns 1.0000000000000002

```

Copy

```
SELECT acos(0.5)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 1.0471975511965979 (pi/3)
```

Copy

atan(col)
```

Copy

```
SELECT atan(1)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 0.7853981633974483 (pi/4)

atan2(y, x)

```

FROM myTable

```

Copy

```
SELECT sinh(1)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 1.1752011936438014

```
SELECT cosh(1)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 1.5430806348152437
```

Copy

```
SELECT tanh(1)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 0.7615941559557649
```

```
asinh(col)

Copy

```
SELECT asinh(0)
FROM myTable
-- Returns 0.0

FROM myTable
-- Returns 0.0

FROM myTable

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT cast(revenue, 'DOUBLE') AS revenue_double
FROM orders
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
bigDecimalToBytes(bigDecimalCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT bigDecimalToBytes(price) AS priceBytes
FROM products
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
bytesToBigDecimal(bytesCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT bytesToBigDecimal(priceBytes) AS price
FROM products
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
hexToBytes(hexString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT hexToBytes('f0e1a3b2') AS rawBytes
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Converts hex string to 4-byte array
```

Copy

```
bytesToHex(bytesCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT bytesToHex(rawData) AS hexString
FROM myTable
LIMIT 5
-- Returns hex representation such as 'f012be3c'
```

Copy

```
base64Encode(bytesCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT base64Encode(payload) AS encodedPayload
FROM events
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
base64Decode(bytesCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT base64Decode(encodedPayload) AS originalPayload
FROM events
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
hexDecimalToLong(hexString)
```

Copy

```
SELECT hexDecimalToLong('0x1a2b') AS longVal
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Returns 6699
```

Copy

```
longToHexDecimal(longCol)
```

Copy

```
SELECT longToHexDecimal(6699) AS hexVal
FROM myTable
LIMIT 1
-- Returns '1a2b'
```

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT urlDomain('https://www.example.com/path');
// Returns: "www.example.com"
```

Copy

```
urlDomainWithoutWWW(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlDomainWithoutWWW('https://www.example.com/path');
// Returns: "example.com"
```

Copy

```
urlTopLevelDomain(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlTopLevelDomain('https://example.com/path');
// Returns: "com"
```

Copy

```
urlFirstSignificantSubdomain(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlFirstSignificantSubdomain('https://blog.example.com');
// Returns: "example"
```

Copy

```
cutToFirstSignificantSubdomain(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutToFirstSignificantSubdomain('https://blog.example.com');
// Returns: "example.com"
```

Copy

```
cutToFirstSignificantSubdomainWithWWW(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutToFirstSignificantSubdomainWithWWW('https://www.blog.example.com');
// Returns: "www.example.com"
```

Copy

```
urlPort(url: String) → int
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlPort('https://example.com:8080/path');
// Returns: 8080
```

Copy

```
urlPath(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlPath('https://example.com/path?query=1');
// Returns: "/path"
```

Copy

```
urlPathWithQuery(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlPathWithQuery('https://example.com/path?query=1');
// Returns: "/path"
```

Copy

```
urlQueryString(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlQueryString('https://example.com/path?key=value#section');
// Returns: "key=value"
```

Copy

```
urlFragment(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlFragment('https://example.com/path#section');
// Returns: "section"
```

Copy

```
urlQueryStringAndFragment(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlQueryStringAndFragment('https://example.com/path?key=value#section');
// Returns: "key=value#section"
```

Copy

```
extractURLParameter(url: String, name: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT extractURLParameter('https://example.com/path?page=1&lr=213', 'page');
// Returns: "1"
```

Copy

```
extractURLParameters(url: String) → String[]
```

Copy

```
SELECT extractURLParameters('https://example.com/path?page=1&lr=213');
// Returns: ["page=1", "lr=213"]
```

Copy

```
extractURLParameterNames(url: String) → String[]
```

Copy

```
SELECT extractURLParameterNames('https://example.com/path?page=1&lr=213');
// Returns: ["page", "lr"]
```

Copy

```
urlHierarchy(url: String) → String[]
```

Copy

```
[
  "https://example.com",
  "https://example.com/a",
  "https://example.com/a/b",
  "https://example.com/a/b/c"
]
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlHierarchy('https://example.com/a/b/c');
// Returns: ["https://example.com", "https://example.com/a", "https://example.com/a/b", "https://example.com/a/b/c"]
```

Copy

```
urlPathHierarchy(url: String) → String[]
```

Copy

```
["/browse", "/browse/CONV-6788"]
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlPathHierarchy('https://example.com/browse/CONV-6788');
// Returns: ["/browse", "/browse/CONV-6788"]
```

Copy

```
urlEncode(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlEncode('https://example.com/path with space');
// Returns: "https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fpath+with+space"
```

Copy

```
urlDecode(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlDecode('https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fpath+with+space');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path with space"
```

Copy

```
urlEncodeFormComponent(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlEncodeFormComponent('Hello World!');
// Returns: "Hello+World%21"
```

Copy

```
urlDecodeFormComponent(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlDecodeFormComponent('Hello+World%21');
// Returns: "Hello World!"
```

Copy

```
urlNetloc(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT urlNetloc('https://user:pass@example.com:8080/path');
// Returns: "user:pass@example.com:8080"
```

Copy

```
cutWWW(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutWWW('https://www.example.com/path');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path"
```

Copy

```
cutQueryString(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutQueryString('https://example.com/path?key=value');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path"
```

Copy

```
cutFragment(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutFragment('https://example.com/path#section');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path"
```

Copy

```
cutQueryStringAndFragment(url: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutQueryStringAndFragment('https://example.com/path?key=value#section');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path"
```

Copy

```
cutURLParameter(url: String, name: String) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutURLParameter('https://example.com/path?key=value&remove=this', 'remove');
// Returns: "https://example.com/path?key=value"
```

Copy

```
cutURLParameters(url: String, names: String[]) → String
```

Copy

```
SELECT cutURLParameters('https://example.com/path?key=value&remove=this&other=param', ARRAY['remove', 'other']);
// Returns: "https://example.com/path?key=value"
```

<a id="functions-udf"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/udf -->

<!-- page_index: 50 -->

# User-Defined Functions (UDFs)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
{"tableName": "myTable","tableType": "OFFLINE",
"query" : {"disableGroovy": false}}
```

Copy

```
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.apache.pinot</groupId>
  <artifactId>pinot-common</artifactId>
  <version>1.2.0</version>
 </dependency>
```

Copy

```
include 'org.apache.pinot:pinot-common:1.2.0'
```

Copy

```
//Example Scalar function

@ScalarFunction
static String mySubStr(String input, Integer beginIndex) {
  return input.substring(beginIndex);
}
```

Copy

```
SELECT mysubstr(playerName, 4) 
FROM baseballStats
```

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select distinctCountThetaSketch(
  sketchCol, 
  'nominalEntries=1024', 
  'country'=''USA'' AND 'state'=''CA'', 'device'=''mobile'', 'SET_INTERSECT($1, $2)'
) 
from table 
where country = 'USA' or device = 'mobile...' 
```

<a id="functions-vector"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/vector -->

<!-- page_index: 52 -->

# Vector / Similarity Functions

- [VECTOR\_SIMILARITY](#functions-vector--vector_similarity)
- [Prerequisites](#functions-vector--prerequisites)
- [Examples](#functions-vector--examples)
- [VECTOR\_SIMILARITY\_RADIUS](#functions-vector--vector_similarity_radius)
- [Syntax](#functions-vector--syntax-1)
- [Behavior](#functions-vector--behavior)
- [Examples](#functions-vector--examples-1)
- [Distance Functions](#functions-vector--distance-functions)
- [cosineDistance](#functions-vector--cosinedistance)
- [innerProduct](#functions-vector--innerproduct)
- [l1Distance](#functions-vector--l1distance)
- [l2Distance](#functions-vector--l2distance)
- [euclideanDistance](#functions-vector--euclideandistance)
- [dotProduct](#functions-vector--dotproduct)
- [Utility Functions](#functions-vector--utility-functions)
- [vectorDims](#functions-vector--vectordims)
- [vectorNorm](#functions-vector--vectornorm)
- [End-to-End Example: Semantic Search](#functions-vector--end-to-end-example-semantic-search)
- [1. Define the schema](#functions-vector--id-1.-define-the-schema)
- [2. Configure the table with a vector index](#functions-vector--id-2.-configure-the-table-with-a-vector-index)
- [3. Query with vector similarity](#functions-vector--id-3.-query-with-vector-similarity)
- [Function Summary](#functions-vector--function-summary)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId,
       cosineDistance(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...]) AS dist
FROM products
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...], 5)
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId, Summary,
       l2Distance(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...]) AS dist
FROM fineFoodReviews
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...], 20)
  AND category = 'electronics'
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY_RADIUS(vectorColumn, queryVector, distanceThreshold)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId,
       cosineDistance(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...]) AS dist
FROM products
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY_RADIUS(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...], 0.3)
ORDER BY dist ASC;
```

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId, Summary,
       l2Distance(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...]) AS dist
FROM products
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY_RADIUS(embedding, ARRAY[0.12, 0.34, 0.56, ...], 5.0)
  AND category = 'electronics'
ORDER BY dist ASC;
```

Copy

```
cosineDistance(vector1, vector2)
cosineDistance(vector1, vector2, defaultValue)
```

Copy

```
SELECT cosineDistance(
  embedding,
  ARRAY[0.1, 0.2, 0.3],
  0.0
) AS dist
FROM products
WHERE category = 'electronics'
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 10
-- Returns 0.0 for identical vectors, up to 2.0 for opposite vectors
```

Copy

```
innerProduct(vector1, vector2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId,
       innerProduct(embedding, ARRAY[0.5, 0.5, 0.5]) AS score
FROM products
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
l1Distance(vector1, vector2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT l1Distance(
  userEmbedding,
  ARRAY[1.0, 2.0, 3.0]
) AS manhattan_dist
FROM users
ORDER BY manhattan_dist ASC
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
l2Distance(vector1, vector2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT l2Distance(
  embedding,
  ARRAY[0.1, 0.2, 0.3]
) AS dist
FROM products
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
euclideanDistance(vector1, vector2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT euclideanDistance(
  embedding,
  ARRAY[0.1, 0.2, 0.3]
) AS squared_dist
FROM products
ORDER BY squared_dist ASC
LIMIT 5
```

Copy

```
dotProduct(vector1, vector2)
```

Copy

```
SELECT dotProduct(
  queryEmbedding,
  docEmbedding
) AS relevance
FROM documents
ORDER BY relevance DESC
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
vectorDims(vector)
```

Copy

```
SELECT vectorDims(embedding) AS dims
FROM products
LIMIT 1
-- Returns 128 for a 128-dimensional embedding
```

Copy

```
vectorNorm(vector)
```

Copy

```
SELECT vectorNorm(embedding) AS norm
FROM products
LIMIT 5
-- Returns the magnitude of each embedding vector
```

Copy

```
{"schemaName": "fineFoodReviews","dimensionFieldSpecs": [{ "name": "ProductId", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "UserId", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "Score", "dataType": "INT" },{ "name": "Summary", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "Text", "dataType": "STRING" },{"name": "embedding","dataType": "FLOAT","singleValueField": false} ],"dateTimeFieldSpecs": [{"name": "ts","dataType": "TIMESTAMP","format": "1:MILLISECONDS:TIMESTAMP","granularity": "1:SECONDS"}]}
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "fineFoodReviews_OFFLINE","tableType": "OFFLINE","fieldConfigList": [{"name": "embedding","encodingType": "RAW","indexes": {"vector": {"vectorIndexType": "HNSW","vectorDimension": 1536,"vectorDistanceFunction": "COSINE","version": 1,"properties": {"maxCon": "32","beamWidth": "200"}}}}]}
```

Copy

```
SELECT ProductId,
       UserId,
       Summary,
       cosineDistance(embedding, ARRAY[-0.0013, -0.0110, 0.0247, ...]) AS dist
FROM fineFoodReviews
WHERE VECTOR_SIMILARITY(embedding, ARRAY[-0.0013, -0.0110, 0.0247, ...], 10)
ORDER BY dist ASC
LIMIT 5
```

<a id="functions-window"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/window -->

<!-- page_index: 53 -->

# Window Functions

- [Window Functions overview](#functions-window--window-functions-overview)
- [Window function syntax](#functions-window--window-function-syntax)
- [Example window function query layout](#functions-window--example-window-function-query-layout)
- [Window mechanism (OVER clause)](#functions-window--window-mechanism-over-clause)
- [Window functions](#functions-window--window-functions)
- [Window aggregate query examples](#functions-window--window-aggregate-query-examples)
- [Sum transactions by customer ID](#functions-window--sum-transactions-by-customer-id)
- [Find the minimum or maximum transaction by customer ID](#functions-window--find-the-minimum-or-maximum-transaction-by-customer-id)
- [Find the average transaction amount by customer ID](#functions-window--find-the-average-transaction-amount-by-customer-id)
- [Rank year-to-date sales for a sales team](#functions-window--rank-year-to-date-sales-for-a-sales-team)
- [Count the number of transactions by customer ID](#functions-window--count-the-number-of-transactions-by-customer-id)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT FUNC(column1) OVER (PARTITION BY column2 ORDER BY column3 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
    FROM tableName
    WHERE filter_clause  
```

Copy

```
SELECT customer_id, payment_date, amount, SUM(amount) OVER(PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY payment_date) from payment;
```

Copy

```
SELECT customer_id, payment_date, amount, MIN(amount) OVER(PARTITION BY customer_id) from payment;
```

Copy

```
SELECT customer_id, payment_date, amount, AVG(amount) OVER(PARTITION BY customer_id) from payment;
```

Copy

```
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SalesYTD DESC) AS Row,   
    FirstName, LastName AS "Total sales YTD"   
FROM Sales.vSalesPerson;  
```

Copy

```
SELECT customer_id, payment_date, amount, count(amount) OVER(PARTITION BY customer_id) from payment;
```

# Broker

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-broker \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartBroker \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartBroker \
  -zkAddress localhost:2181 \
  -clusterName PinotCluster \
  -brokerPort 7000
```

Copy

```
curl -X GET "http://localhost:9000/periodictask/run?taskname=SegmentStatusChecker&tableName=jsontypetable&type=OFFLINE" -H "accept: application/json"

{
  "Log Request Id": "api-09630c07",
  "Controllers notified": true
}
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-controller \
    -p 9000:9000 \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartController \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartController \
  -zkAddress localhost:2181 \
  -clusterName PinotCluster \
  -controllerPort 9000
```

```

{% hint style="warning" %}
**Duplicate Keys in Configuration File**

Starting from Apache Pinot 1.3.0, duplicate keys in the minion configuration file will cause a `ConfigurationException` to be thrown during startup. Previously, duplicate keys would be silently merged into a list. If you encounter this error, ensure that each configuration property appears only once in your configuration file. The exception will include the exact file path, duplicate key name, and the line numbers where the duplicates were found.

Example error:
```

Copy

```
{% endhint %}
public interface PinotTaskGenerator {
/** * Initializes the task generator.*/ void init(ClusterInfoAccessor clusterInfoAccessor);
/** * Returns the task type of the generator.*/ String getTaskType();
/** * Generates a list of tasks to schedule based on the given table configs.*/ List<PinotTaskConfig> generateTasks(List<TableConfig> tableConfigs);
/** * Returns the timeout in milliseconds for each task, 3600000 (1 hour) by default.*/ default long getTaskTimeoutMs() {return JobConfig.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_PER_TASK;}
/** * Returns the maximum number of concurrent tasks allowed per instance, 1 by default.*/ default int getNumConcurrentTasksPerInstance() {return JobConfig.DEFAULT_NUM_CONCURRENT_TASKS_PER_INSTANCE;}
/** * Performs necessary cleanups (e.g. remove metrics) when the controller leadership changes.*/ default void nonLeaderCleanUp() {}}
```

Copy

```
public interface PinotTaskExecutorFactory {
/** * Initializes the task executor factory.*/ void init(MinionTaskZkMetadataManager zkMetadataManager);
/** * Returns the task type of the executor.*/ String getTaskType();
/** * Creates a new task executor.*/ PinotTaskExecutor create();}
```

Copy

```
public interface PinotTaskExecutor {
/** * Executes the task based on the given task config and returns the execution result.*/ Object executeTask(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig) throws Exception;
/** * Tries to cancel the task.*/ void cancel();}
```

Copy

```
public interface MinionEventObserverFactory {
/** * Initializes the task executor factory.*/ void init(MinionTaskZkMetadataManager zkMetadataManager);
/** * Returns the task type of the event observer.*/ String getTaskType();
/** * Creates a new task event observer.*/ MinionEventObserver create();}
```

Copy

```
public interface MinionEventObserver {
/** * Invoked when a minion task starts.* * @param pinotTaskConfig Pinot task config */ void notifyTaskStart(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig);
/** * Invoked when a minion task succeeds.* * @param pinotTaskConfig Pinot task config * @param executionResult Execution result */ void notifyTaskSuccess(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig, @Nullable Object executionResult);
/** * Invoked when a minion task gets cancelled.* * @param pinotTaskConfig Pinot task config */ void notifyTaskCancelled(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig);
/** * Invoked when a minion task encounters exception.* * @param pinotTaskConfig Pinot task config * @param exception Exception encountered during execution */ void notifyTaskError(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig, Exception exception);}
```

Copy

```
"ingestionConfig": {"batchIngestionConfig": {"segmentIngestionType": "APPEND","segmentIngestionFrequency": "DAILY","batchConfigMaps": [{"input.fs.className": "org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.S3PinotFS","input.fs.prop.region": "us-west-2","input.fs.prop.secretKey": "....","input.fs.prop.accessKey": "....","inputDirURI": "s3://my.s3.bucket/batch/airlineStats/rawdata/","includeFileNamePattern": "glob:**/*.avro","excludeFileNamePattern": "glob:**/*.tmp","inputFormat": "avro"}]} },"task": {"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"SegmentGenerationAndPushTask": {"schedule": "0 */10 * * * ?","tableMaxNumTasks": "10"}}}
```

Copy

```
{..."task": {"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"myTask": {"myProperty1": "value1","myProperty2": "value2"}}}}
```

Copy

```
{..."task": {"concurrentSchedulingEnabled": true,"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"myTask": {"myProperty1": "value1"}}}}
```

Copy

```
Using "POST /cluster/configs" API on CLUSTER tab in Swagger, with this payload
{
	"RealtimeToOfflineSegmentsTask.timeoutMs": "600000",
	"RealtimeToOfflineSegmentsTask.numConcurrentTasksPerInstance": "4"
}
```

Copy

```
controller.task.enableDistributedLocking=true
controller.task.concurrentSchedulingEnabled=true
```

Copy

```
"task": {"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"RealtimeToOfflineSegmentsTask": {"bucketTimePeriod": "1h","bufferTimePeriod": "1h","schedule": "0 * * * * ?"}} },
```

Copy

```
"task": {"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"RealtimeToOfflineSegmentsTask": {"bucketTimePeriod": "1h","bufferTimePeriod": "1h","schedule": "0 * * * * ?","minionInstanceTag": "tag1_MINION"}} },
```

# Server

- [Offline](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-server--offline)
- [Real-time](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-server--real-time)
- [Starting a server](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-server--starting-a-server)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
Usage: StartServer
	-serverHost               <String>                      : Host name for controller. (required=false)
	-serverPort               <int>                         : Port number to start the server at. (required=false)
	-serverAdminPort          <int>                         : Port number to serve the server admin API at. (required=false)
	-dataDir                  <string>                      : Path to directory containing data. (required=false)
	-segmentDir               <string>                      : Path to directory containing segments. (required=false)
	-zkAddress                <http>                        : Http address of Zookeeper. (required=false)
	-clusterName              <String>                      : Pinot cluster name. (required=false)
	-configFileName           <Config File Name>            : Broker Starter Config file. (required=false)
	-help                                                   : Print this message. (required=false)
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-server \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartServer \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartServer \
    -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

# Tenant

- [Tenant configuration](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-tenant--tenant-configuration)
- [Create a tenant](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-tenant--create-a-tenant)
- [Server tenant](#architecture-and-concepts-components-cluster-tenant--server-tenant)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
"tenants": {
  "broker": "brokerTenantName",
  "server": "serverTenantName"
}
```

Copy

```
{
     "tenantRole" : "BROKER",
     "tenantName" : "sampleBrokerTenant",
     "numberOfInstances" : 3
}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTenant \
    -name sampleBrokerTenant 
    -role BROKER 
    -instanceCount 3 -exec
```

Copy

```
curl -i -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @sample-broker-tenant.json localhost:9000/tenants
```

Copy

```
{
     "tenantRole" : "SERVER",
     "tenantName" : "sampleServerTenant",
     "offlineInstances" : 1,
     "realtimeInstances" : 1
}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTenant \
    -name sampleServerTenant \
    -role SERVER \
    -offlineInstanceCount 1 \
    -realtimeInstanceCount 1 -exec
```

Copy

```
curl -i -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @sample-server-tenant.json localhost:9000/tenants
```

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select playerName, max(hits)
from baseballStats
group by playerName
order by max(hits) desc
```

Copy

```
select sum(hits), sum(homeRuns), sum(numberOfGames)
from baseballStats
where yearID > 2010
```

Copy

```
select *
from baseballStats
order by league
```

Copy

```
    "tableIndexConfig": { 
      "noDictionaryColumns": ["metric1", "metric2"],
      "aggregateMetrics": true,
      ...
    }
```

Copy

```
  "broker": "brokerTenantName",
  "server": "serverTenantName",
  "tagOverrideConfig" : {
    "realtimeConsuming" : "serverTenantName_REALTIME"
    "realtimeCompleted" : "serverTenantName_OFFLINE"
  }
}
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-batch-table-creation \
    ${PINOT_IMAGE} AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json \
    -controllerHost pinot-controller \
    -controllerPort 9000 \
    -exec
```

Copy

```
Executing command: AddTable -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json -controllerHost pinot-controller -controllerPort 9000 -exec
Sending request: http://pinot-controller:9000/schemas to controller: a413b0013806, version: Unknown
{"status":"Table airlineStats_OFFLINE succesfully added"}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json \
    -exec
```

Copy

```
# add schema curl -F schemaName=@airlineStats_schema.json localhost:9000/schemas

# add table curl -i -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -d @airlineStats_offline_table_config.json localhost:9000/tables
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network pinot-demo --name=kafka \
    -e KAFKA_NODE_ID=1 \
    -e KAFKA_PROCESS_ROLES=broker,controller \
    -e KAFKA_LISTENERS=PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092,CONTROLLER://0.0.0.0:9093 \
    -e KAFKA_ADVERTISED_LISTENERS=PLAINTEXT://kafka:9092 \
    -e KAFKA_CONTROLLER_LISTENER_NAMES=CONTROLLER \
    -e KAFKA_LISTENER_SECURITY_PROTOCOL_MAP=CONTROLLER:PLAINTEXT,PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT \
    -e KAFKA_CONTROLLER_QUORUM_VOTERS=1@kafka:9093 \
    -e KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR=1 \
    -e CLUSTER_ID=MkU3OEVBNTcwNTJENDM2Qk \
    -d apache/kafka:4.0.0
```

Copy

```
docker exec \
  -t kafka \
  /opt/kafka/bin/kafka-topics.sh \
  --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 \
  --partitions=1 --replication-factor=1 \
  --create --topic flights-realtime
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-streaming-table-creation \
    ${PINOT_IMAGE} AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/stream/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/docker/table-configs/airlineStats_realtime_table_config.json \
    -controllerHost pinot-controller \
    -controllerPort 9000 \
    -exec
```

Copy

```
Executing command: AddTable -tableConfigFile examples/docker/table-configs/airlineStats_realtime_table_config.json -schemaFile examples/stream/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json -controllerHost pinot-controller -controllerPort 9000 -exec
Sending request: http://pinot-controller:9000/schemas to controller: 8fbe601012f3, version: Unknown
{"status":"Table airlineStats_REALTIME succesfully added"}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartZookeeper -zkPort 2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh  StartKafka -zkAddress=localhost:2181/kafka -port 19092
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/stream/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/stream/airlineStats/airlineStats_realtime_table_config.json \
    -exec
```

Copy

```
"OFFLINE": {"tableName": "pinotTable","tableType": "OFFLINE","segmentsConfig": {...},"tableIndexConfig": {...},"tenants": {"broker": "myBrokerTenant","server": "myServerTenant" },"metadata": {...} },"REALTIME": {"tableName": "pinotTable","tableType": "REALTIME","segmentsConfig": {...},"tableIndexConfig": {..."streamConfigs": {...},},"tenants": {"broker": "myBrokerTenant","server": "myServerTenant" },"metadata": {...}}}
```

Copy

```
SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "orders","brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant","physicalTableConfigMap": {"ordersUS_OFFLINE": {},"ordersEU_OFFLINE": {},"ordersAPAC_OFFLINE": {} },"refOfflineTableName": "ordersUS_OFFLINE"}
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "events","brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant","physicalTableConfigMap": {"eventsHistorical_OFFLINE": {},"eventsRecent_OFFLINE": {},"eventsLive_REALTIME": {} },"refOfflineTableName": "eventsHistorical_OFFLINE","refRealtimeTableName": "eventsLive_REALTIME","timeBoundaryConfig": {"boundaryStrategy": "min","parameters": {"includedTables": ["eventsRecent_OFFLINE"]}}}
```

Copy

```
{"schemaName": "orders","dimensionFieldSpecs": [{ "name": "orderId", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "customerId", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "region", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "productId", "dataType": "STRING" },{ "name": "status", "dataType": "STRING" }]}
```

Copy

```
curl -F schemaName=@orders_schema.json localhost:9000/schemas
```

Copy

```
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "tableName": "orders",
    "brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant",
    "physicalTableConfigMap": {
      "ordersUS_OFFLINE": {},
      "ordersEU_OFFLINE": {},
      "ordersAPAC_OFFLINE": {}
    },
    "refOfflineTableName": "ordersUS_OFFLINE"
  }' \
  http://localhost:9000/logicalTables
```

Copy

```
curl http://localhost:9000/logicalTables
```

Copy

```
curl http://localhost:9000/logicalTables/{tableName}
```

Copy

```
curl -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "tableName": "orders",
    "brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant",
    "physicalTableConfigMap": {
      "ordersUS_OFFLINE": {},
      "ordersEU_OFFLINE": {},
      "ordersAPAC_OFFLINE": {},
      "ordersANZ_OFFLINE": {}
    },
    "refOfflineTableName": "ordersUS_OFFLINE"
  }' \
  http://localhost:9000/logicalTables/orders
```

Copy

```
curl -X DELETE http://localhost:9000/logicalTables/{tableName}
```

Copy

```
-- Query the logical table
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders

-- Filter by region
SELECT orderId, customerId, region, status
FROM orders
WHERE region = 'us'
LIMIT 10

-- Aggregate across all regions
SELECT region, COUNT(*) as orderCount
FROM orders
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY region
```

Copy

```
{"timeBoundaryConfig": {"boundaryStrategy": "min","parameters": {"includedTables": ["eventsRecent_OFFLINE"]}}}
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "orders","brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant","physicalTableConfigMap": { ... },"refOfflineTableName": "ordersUS_OFFLINE","query": {"timeoutMs": 30000,"disableGroovy": true,"maxServerResponseSizeBytes": 1000000,"maxQueryResponseSizeBytes": 5000000}}
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "orders","brokerTenant": "DefaultTenant","physicalTableConfigMap": { ... },"refOfflineTableName": "ordersUS_OFFLINE","quota": {"maxQueriesPerSecond": 100}}
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    -p 9000:9000 \
    apachepinot/pinot:latest QuickStart \
    -type LOGICAL_TABLE
```

Copy

```
./bin/pinot-admin.sh QuickStart -type LOGICAL_TABLE
```

Copy

```
public class MyCustomSerDe implements LogicalTableConfigSerDe {
    @Override
    public byte[] serialize(LogicalTableConfig config) { /* ... */ }

    @Override
    public LogicalTableConfig deserialize(byte[] bytes) { /* ... */ }
}
```

Copy

```
META-INF/services/org.apache.pinot.spi.config.table.logical.LogicalTableConfigSerDeProvider
```

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
{"schemaName": "flights","enableColumnBasedNullHandling": true,"dimensionFieldSpecs": [{"name": "flightNumber","dataType": "LONG","notNull": true },{"name": "tags","dataType": "STRING","singleValueField": false,"defaultNullValue": "null"} ],"metricFieldSpecs": [{"name": "price","dataType": "DOUBLE","notNull": true,"defaultNullValue": 0} ],"dateTimeFieldSpecs": [{"name": "millisSinceEpoch","dataType": "LONG","format": "EPOCH","granularity": "15:MINUTES" },{"name": "hoursSinceEpoch","dataType": "INT","notNull": true,"format": "EPOCH|HOURS","granularity": "1:HOURS" },{"name": "dateString","dataType": "STRING","format": "SIMPLE_DATE_FORMAT|yyyy-MM-dd","granularity": "1:DAYS"}]}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddSchema -schemaFile flights-schema.json -exec

OR

bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTable -schemaFile flights-schema.json -tableFile flights-table.json -exec
```

Copy

```
curl -F schemaName=@transcript-schema.json  localhost:9000/schemas
```

Copy

```
executionFrameworkSpec:
  name: 'standalone'
  segmentGenerationJobRunnerClassName: 'org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentGenerationJobRunner'
  segmentTarPushJobRunnerClassName: 'org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentTarPushJobRunner'
  segmentUriPushJobRunnerClassName: 'org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentUriPushJobRunner'

jobType: SegmentCreationAndTarPush
inputDirURI: 'examples/batch/baseballStats/rawdata'
includeFileNamePattern: 'glob:**/*.csv'
excludeFileNamePattern: 'glob:**/*.tmp'
outputDirURI: 'examples/batch/baseballStats/segments'
overwriteOutput: true

pinotFSSpecs:
  - scheme: file
    className: org.apache.pinot.spi.filesystem.LocalPinotFS

recordReaderSpec:
  dataFormat: 'csv'
  className: 'org.apache.pinot.plugin.inputformat.csv.CSVRecordReader'
  configClassName: 'org.apache.pinot.plugin.inputformat.csv.CSVRecordReaderConfig'
  configs:

tableSpec:
  tableName: 'baseballStats'
  schemaURI: 'http://localhost:9000/tables/baseballStats/schema'
  tableConfigURI: 'http://localhost:9000/tables/baseballStats'
  
segmentNameGeneratorSpec:

pinotClusterSpecs:
  - controllerURI: 'http://localhost:9000'

pushJobSpec:
  pushParallelism: 2
  pushAttempts: 2
  pushRetryIntervalMillis: 1000
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-data-ingestion-job \
    ${PINOT_IMAGE} LaunchDataIngestionJob \
    -jobSpecFile examples/docker/ingestion-job-specs/airlineStats.yaml
```

Copy

```
SegmentGenerationJobSpec:
!!org.apache.pinot.spi.ingestion.batch.spec.SegmentGenerationJobSpec
excludeFileNamePattern: null
executionFrameworkSpec: {extraConfigs: null, name: standalone, segmentGenerationJobRunnerClassName: org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentGenerationJobRunner,
  segmentTarPushJobRunnerClassName: org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentTarPushJobRunner,
  segmentUriPushJobRunnerClassName: org.apache.pinot.plugin.ingestion.batch.standalone.SegmentUriPushJobRunner}
includeFileNamePattern: glob:**/*.avro
inputDirURI: examples/batch/airlineStats/rawdata
jobType: SegmentCreationAndTarPush
outputDirURI: examples/batch/airlineStats/segments
overwriteOutput: true
pinotClusterSpecs:
- {controllerURI: 'http://pinot-controller:9000'}
pinotFSSpecs:
- {className: org.apache.pinot.spi.filesystem.LocalPinotFS, configs: null, scheme: file}
pushJobSpec: {pushAttempts: 2, pushParallelism: 1, pushRetryIntervalMillis: 1000,
  segmentUriPrefix: null, segmentUriSuffix: null}
recordReaderSpec: {className: org.apache.pinot.plugin.inputformat.avro.AvroRecordReader,
  configClassName: null, configs: null, dataFormat: avro}
segmentNameGeneratorSpec: null
tableSpec: {schemaURI: 'http://pinot-controller:9000/tables/airlineStats/schema',
  tableConfigURI: 'http://pinot-controller:9000/tables/airlineStats', tableName: airlineStats}

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh LaunchDataIngestionJob \
    -jobSpecFile examples/batch/airlineStats/ingestionJobSpec.yaml
```

Copy

```
inputDirURI: 'examples/batch/airlineStats/rawdata/${year}/${month}/${day}'
outputDirURI: 'examples/batch/airlineStats/segments/${year}/${month}/${day}'
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-data-ingestion-job \
    ${PINOT_IMAGE} LaunchDataIngestionJob \
    -jobSpecFile examples/docker/ingestion-job-specs/airlineStats.yaml
    -values year=2014 month=01 day=03
```

Copy

```
docker run \
  --network pinot-demo \
  --name=loading-airlineStats-data-to-kafka \
  ${PINOT_IMAGE} StreamAvroIntoKafka \
  -avroFile examples/stream/airlineStats/sample_data/airlineStats_data.avro \
  -kafkaTopic flights-realtime -kafkaBrokerList kafka:9092 -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181/kafka
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StreamAvroIntoKafka \
  -avroFile examples/stream/airlineStats/sample_data/airlineStats_data.avro \
  -kafkaTopic flights-realtime -kafkaBrokerList localhost:19092 -zkAddress localhost:2181/kafka
```

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT count(*)
FROM events
```

Copy

```
SELECT count(*)
FROM events_OFFLINE
WHERE timeColumn <= $timeBoundary
```

Copy

```
SELECT count(*)
FROM events_REALTIME
WHERE timeColumn > $timeBoundary
```

- [Prerequisites](#build-with-pinot-connectors-clients-apis-bi-tools-metabase--prerequisites)
- [QuickStart](#build-with-pinot-connectors-clients-apis-bi-tools-metabase--quickstart)
- [Docker Compose](#build-with-pinot-connectors-clients-apis-bi-tools-metabase--docker-compose)
- [Advanced Options](#build-with-pinot-connectors-clients-apis-bi-tools-metabase--advanced-options)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
docker run -d --name pinot-quickstart -p 9000:9000 -p 8000:8000 -p 8080:8080 apachepinot/pinot:latest  QuickStart -type MULTI_STAGE
```

Copy

```
mkdir -p /tmp/metabase
cd /tmp/metabase
wget https://downloads.metabase.com/v0.55.7.x/metabase.jar
```

Copy

```
mkdir -p /tmp/metabase/plugins
cd /tmp/metabase/plugins
wget -O pinot.metabase-driver.jar  https://github.com/startreedata/metabase-pinot-driver/releases/download/v1.1.0/pinot.metabase-driver-v1.1.0.jar
```

Copy

```
cd /tmp/metabase
java --add-opens java.base/java.nio=ALL-UNNAMED -jar metabase.jar
```

Copy

```
FROM metabase/metabase:v0.55.7

RUN mkdir -p /plugins && \
    curl -L -o /plugins/pinot.metabase-driver.jar \
    https://github.com/startreedata/metabase-pinot-driver/releases/download/v1.1.0/pinot.metabase-driver-v1.1.0.jar

ENV MB_PLUGINS_DIR=/plugins
```

Copy

```
services:
  metabase:
    build: .
    container_name: metabase-pinot
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - MB_PLUGINS_DIR=/plugins
    volumes:
      - metabase_data:/metabase-data
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  metabase_data:
```

Copy

```
PINOT_VERSION=$(ls -td ~/.m2/repository/org/apache/pinot/pinot/*/ | head -1 | grep -o "\d*.\d*\.\d*-SNAPSHOT") 
```

Copy

```
echo $PINOT_VERSION
```

Copy

```
cd ~/Library/Tableau/Drivers
cp ~/.m2/repository/com/ning/async-http-client/1.9.21/async-http-client-1.9.21.jar .
cp ~/.m2/repository/org/apache/pinot/pinot-jdbc-shaded/$PINOT_VERSION/pinot-jdbc-shaded-$PINOT_VERSION.jar .
```

Copy

```
ls ~/Library/Tableau/Drivers
...
async-http-client-1.9.21.jar         calcite-core-1.34.0.jar 
pinot-jdbc-shaded-0.13.0-SNAPSHOT.jar
```

Copy

```
$PINOT_VERSION = (Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\.m2\repository\org\apache\pinot\pinot" -Directory |
    Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending |
    Select-Object -First 1).Name
Write-Host $PINOT_VERSION
```

Copy

```
$M2 = "$env:USERPROFILE\.m2\repository"
$TABLEAU_DRIVERS = "C:\Program Files\Tableau\Drivers"

Copy-Item "$M2\com\ning\async-http-client\1.9.21\async-http-client-1.9.21.jar" $TABLEAU_DRIVERS
Copy-Item "$M2\org\apache\pinot\pinot-jdbc-shaded\$PINOT_VERSION\pinot-jdbc-shaded-$PINOT_VERSION.jar" $TABLEAU_DRIVERS
```

Copy

```
Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files\Tableau\Drivers" -Filter "*.jar"
```

Copy

```
async-http-client-1.9.21.jar
calcite-core-1.34.0.jar
pinot-jdbc-shaded-1.5.0-SNAPSHOT.jar
```
