```
package org.apache.pinot.spi.config.instance;
public interface InstanceConfigValidator {/** * Validates an instance configuration.* * @param instance the instance configuration to validate * @throws ConfigValidationException if validation fails */ void validate(Instance instance) throws ConfigValidationException;}
```

Copy

```
InstanceConfigValidatorRegistry.register(new MyInstanceConfigValidator());
```

Copy

```
package org.apache.pinot.spi.exception;
public class ConfigValidationException extends RuntimeException {public ConfigValidationException(String message) {super(message);}
public ConfigValidationException(String message, Throwable cause) {super(message, cause);}}
```

Copy

```
import org.apache.pinot.spi.config.table.TableConfig; import org.apache.pinot.spi.config.table.TableConfigValidator; import org.apache.pinot.spi.exception.ConfigValidationException; import org.apache.pinot.spi.data.Schema; import javax.annotation.Nullable;
public class TableNamePrefixValidator implements TableConfigValidator {private final String requiredPrefix;
public TableNamePrefixValidator(String requiredPrefix) {this.requiredPrefix = requiredPrefix;}
@Override public void validate(TableConfig tableConfig, @Nullable Schema schema) throws ConfigValidationException {String tableName = tableConfig.getTableName();
if (!tableName.startsWith(requiredPrefix)) {throw new ConfigValidationException(String.format("Table name '%s' must start with prefix '%s'",tableName,requiredPrefix) );}}}
```

Copy

```
TableConfigValidatorRegistry.register(
    new TableNamePrefixValidator("prod_")
);
```

Copy

```
import org.apache.pinot.spi.config.instance.Instance; import org.apache.pinot.spi.config.instance.InstanceConfigValidator; import org.apache.pinot.spi.exception.ConfigValidationException;
public class InstanceTagValidator implements InstanceConfigValidator {private static final String REQUIRED_TAG = "monitoring_enabled";
@Override public void validate(Instance instance) throws ConfigValidationException {if (!instance.getTags().contains(REQUIRED_TAG)) {throw new ConfigValidationException(String.format("Instance '%s' must have the '%s' tag",instance.getInstanceId(),REQUIRED_TAG) );}}}
```

Copy

```
InstanceConfigValidatorRegistry.register(new InstanceTagValidator());
```

Copy

```
import org.apache.pinot.minion.executor.PinotTaskExecutorFactory; import org.apache.pinot.minion.executor.PinotTaskExecutor; import org.apache.pinot.spi.annotations.minion.TaskExecutorFactory;
@TaskExecutorFactory(enabled = true) public class MyTaskExecutorFactory implements PinotTaskExecutorFactory {
@Override public void init(MinionTaskZkMetadataManager zkMetadataManager, MinionConf minionConf) {// Initialize resources needed by the executor}
@Override public String getTaskType() {return "MyCustomTask";  // Must match the generator's task type}
@Override public PinotTaskExecutor create() {return new MyTaskExecutor();}}
```

Copy

```
import org.apache.pinot.minion.executor.PinotTaskExecutor;
import org.apache.pinot.core.minion.PinotTaskConfig;

public class MyTaskExecutor implements PinotTaskExecutor {

  private volatile boolean _cancelled = false;

  @Override
  public Object executeTask(PinotTaskConfig pinotTaskConfig) throws Exception {
    String tableName = pinotTaskConfig.getTableName();
    Map<String, String> config = pinotTaskConfig.getConfig();

    // Perform the task work here
    // Check _cancelled periodically for long-running tasks

    return "Task completed successfully";
  }

  @Override
  public void cancel() {
    _cancelled = true;
  }
}
```

Copy

```
import org.apache.pinot.controller.helix.core.minion.generator.PinotTaskGenerator;
import org.apache.pinot.spi.annotations.minion.TaskGenerator;
import org.apache.pinot.spi.config.table.TableConfig;
import org.apache.pinot.core.minion.PinotTaskConfig;

@TaskGenerator(enabled = true)
public class MyTaskGenerator implements PinotTaskGenerator {

  private ClusterInfoAccessor _clusterInfoAccessor;

  @Override
  public void init(ClusterInfoAccessor clusterInfoAccessor) {
    _clusterInfoAccessor = clusterInfoAccessor;
  }

  @Override
  public String getTaskType() {
    return "MyCustomTask";  // Must match the executor's task type
  }

  // Called on schedule for all tables with this task type enabled
  @Override
  public List<PinotTaskConfig> generateTasks(List<TableConfig> tableConfigs) {
    List<PinotTaskConfig> tasks = new ArrayList<>();
    for (TableConfig tableConfig : tableConfigs) {
      Map<String, String> taskConfig = new HashMap<>();
      taskConfig.put("myParam", "myValue");

      tasks.add(new PinotTaskConfig(
          getTaskType(),
          tableConfig.getTableName(),
          taskConfig));
    }
    return tasks;
  }

  // Called for ad-hoc task execution via API
  @Override
  public List<PinotTaskConfig> generateTasks(
      TableConfig tableConfig, Map<String, String> taskConfigs) throws Exception {
    return List.of(new PinotTaskConfig(
        getTaskType(),
        tableConfig.getTableName(),
        taskConfigs));
  }
}
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "myTable_OFFLINE","task": {"taskTypeConfigsMap": {"MyCustomTask": {"schedule": "0 0 * * * ?","myParam": "myValue"}}}}
```

Copy

```
# Generate tasks for all tables with this task type POST /tasks/schedule?taskType=MyCustomTask

# Generate tasks for a specific table POST /tasks/execute?taskType=MyCustomTask&tableName=myTable_OFFLINE
```

```
import com.google.auto.service.AutoService; import org.apache.pinot.query.runtime.operator.OpChainConverter;
@AutoService(OpChainConverter.class) public class CustomOpChainConverter implements OpChainConverter {
@Override public OpChain convert(PlanRequestContext context, PlanNode planNode) {// Implement your conversion logic here // Return null if this converter cannot handle the plan if (!canHandle(planNode)) {return null;} return convertToOpChain(context, planNode);}
@Override public int priority() {return 100; // Set your converter's priority}
@Override public String getId() {return "custom-converter";}
private boolean canHandle(PlanNode planNode) {// Implement logic to determine if this converter can handle the plan return true;}
private OpChain convertToOpChain(PlanRequestContext context, PlanNode planNode) {// Implement your conversion logic return null;}}
```

Copy

```
com.example.CustomOpChainConverter
```

Copy

```
import com.google.auto.service.AutoService;
import org.apache.pinot.query.planner.PlanNode;
import org.apache.pinot.query.runtime.operator.OpChain;
import org.apache.pinot.query.runtime.operator.OpChainConverter;
import org.apache.pinot.query.runtime.plan.PlanRequestContext;

@AutoService(OpChainConverter.class)
public class TimeSeriesOpChainConverter implements OpChainConverter {
  private static final String CONVERTER_ID = "timeseries-converter";
  private static final int PRIORITY = 50;

  @Override
  public OpChain convert(PlanRequestContext context, PlanNode planNode) {
    // Check if this is a time-series query that we can optimize
    if (!isTimeSeriesQuery(planNode)) {
      return null;
    }

    // Perform custom conversion optimized for time-series execution
    return optimizeTimeSeriesExecution(context, planNode);
  }

  @Override
  public int priority() {
    return PRIORITY;
  }

  @Override
  public String getId() {
    return CONVERTER_ID;
  }

  private boolean isTimeSeriesQuery(PlanNode planNode) {
    // Implement logic to detect time-series queries
    // For example, check for time-based aggregations, windowing, etc.
    return false;
  }

  private OpChain optimizeTimeSeriesExecution(PlanRequestContext context, PlanNode planNode) {
    // Implement time-series-specific optimization logic
    return null;
  }
}
```

```
SegmentWriter writer = new FileBasedSegmentWriter();
writer.init(tableConfig, schema);

for (GenericRow row : rows) {
  writer.collect(row);
}

URI segmentURI = writer.flush();
// segmentURI points to the generated .tar.gz file

writer.close();
```

- [Requirements to support Partition Level (Low Level) consumers](#develop-and-contribute-plugin-architecture-write-custom-plugins-write-your-stream--requirements-to-support-partition-level-low-level-consumers)
- [Stream plug-in implementation](#develop-and-contribute-plugin-architecture-write-custom-plugins-write-your-stream--stream-plug-in-implementation)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
"streamType" : "foo",
"stream.foo.topic.name" : "SomeTopic",
"stream.foo.consumer.factory.class.name": "fully.qualified.pkg.ConsumerFactoryClassName",
"stream.foo.consumer.prop.auto.offset.reset": "largest",
"stream.foo.decoder.class.name" : "fully.qualified.pkg.DecoderClassName",
"stream.foo.decoder.prop.a.decoder.property" : "decoderPropValue",
"stream.foo.connection.timeout.millis" : "10000", // default 30_000
"stream.foo.fetch.timeout.millis" : "10000" // default 5_000
```

Copy

```
"stream.foo.some.buffer.size" : "24g"
```

Copy

```
"realtime.segment.flush.threshold.rows" : "100000"
"realtime.segment.flush.threshold.time" : "6h"
```

---

<a id="functions-aggregation-distinctcountrawthetasketch"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/distinctcountrawthetasketch -->

<!-- page_index: 259 -->

# DISTINCTCOUNTRAWTHETASKETCH

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select distinctCountRawThetaSketch(teamID, 'nominalEntries=10') AS value
from baseballStats
```

Copy

```
select distinctCountRawThetaSketch(
  yearID, 
  'nominalEntries=4096', 
  'teamID = ''SFN'' AND numberOfGames=28 AND homeRuns=1',
  'teamID = ''CHN'' AND numberOfGames=28 AND homeRuns=1',
  'SET_INTERSECT($1, $2)'
) AS value
from baseballStats 
```

---

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/distinctcountthetasketch -->

<!-- page_index: 261 -->

# DISTINCTCOUNTTHETASKETCH

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select distinctCountThetaSketch(teamID, 'nominalEntries=10') AS value
from baseballStats
```

Copy

```
select yearID
from baseballStats
where teamID = 'SFN' AND numberOfGames = 28 AND homeRuns = 1
```

Copy

```
select yearID
from baseballStats
where teamID = 'CHN' AND numberOfGames = 28 AND homeRuns = 1
```

Copy

```
select distinctCountThetaSketch(
  yearID, 
  'nominalEntries=4096', 
  'teamID = ''SFN'' AND numberOfGames=28 AND homeRuns=1',
  'teamID = ''CHN'' AND numberOfGames=28 AND homeRuns=1',
  'SET_INTERSECT($1, $2)'
) AS value
from baseballStats 
```

---

<a id="functions-aggregation-funneleventsfunctioneval"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/funneleventsfunctioneval -->

<!-- page_index: 269 -->

# FUNNELEVENTSFUNCTIONEVAL

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-funneleventsfunctioneval--signature)
- [Parameters](#functions-aggregation-funneleventsfunctioneval--parameters)
- [Returns](#functions-aggregation-funneleventsfunctioneval--returns)
- [Example](#functions-aggregation-funneleventsfunctioneval--example)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
  userId,
  funnelEventsFunctionEval(
    timestampCol,
    '1000',
    4,
    url = '/product/search',
    url = '/cart/add',
    url = '/checkout/start',
    url = '/checkout/confirmation',
    3,
    timestampCol,
    userId,
    url
  ) AS funnelEvents
FROM events
GROUP BY userId
ORDER BY userId
```

Copy

```
["1, 12", "1000", "user00", "/product/search", "1010", "user00", "/cart/add", ...]
```

---

<a id="functions-aggregation-funnelstepdurationstats"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/funnelstepdurationstats -->

<!-- page_index: 270 -->

# FUNNELSTEPDURATIONSTATS

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-funnelstepdurationstats--signature)
- [Parameters](#functions-aggregation-funnelstepdurationstats--parameters)
- [Returns](#functions-aggregation-funnelstepdurationstats--returns)
- [Example](#functions-aggregation-funnelstepdurationstats--example)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
  userId,
  funnelStepDurationStats(
    timestampCol,
    '1000',
    4,
    url = '/product/search',
    url = '/cart/add',
    url = '/checkout/start',
    url = '/checkout/confirmation',
    'durationFunctions=count,avg,min,median,percentile95,max'
  ) AS statsArray
FROM events
GROUP BY userId
HAVING arrayLength(statsArray) > 0
ORDER BY userId
```

<a id="functions-aggregation-lag"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/lag -->

<!-- page_index: 274 -->

# LAG

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-lag--signature)
- [Arguments](#functions-aggregation-lag--arguments)
- [Example](#functions-aggregation-lag--example)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
    payment_date,
    amount,
    LAG(amount, 1) OVER (ORDER BY payment_date) AS previous_amount
FROM
    payment;
```

Copy

```
SELECT
    month,
    year,
    data_value,
    LAG(data_value, 12) OVER (ORDER BY year, month) AS previous_year_data
FROM
    monthly_data;
```

Copy

```
WITH tmp AS (
  select count(*) as num_trips,
    DaysSinceEpoch
  from airlineStats
  GROUP BY DaysSinceEpoch
)

SELECT DaysSinceEpoch,
  num_trips,
  LAG(num_trips, 2) OVER (
    ORDER BY DaysSinceEpoch
  ) AS previous_num_trips,
  num_trips - LAG(num_trips, 2) OVER (
    ORDER BY DaysSinceEpoch
  ) AS difference
FROM tmp;
```

---

<a id="functions-aggregation-last_value"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/last_value -->

<!-- page_index: 275 -->

# LAST_VALUE

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-last_value--signature)
- [Example 1](#functions-aggregation-last_value--example-1)
- [Example 2](#functions-aggregation-last_value--example-2)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT ts,
  reading,
  LAST_VALUE(reading) IGNORE NULLS OVER (
    ORDER BY ts
  ) AS imputedReading
FROM telemetryData;
```

<a id="functions-aggregation-lead"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/lead -->

<!-- page_index: 277 -->

# LEAD

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-lead--signature)
- [Arguments](#functions-aggregation-lead--arguments)
- [Example](#functions-aggregation-lead--example)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
    transaction_id,
    payment_date,
    amount,
    LEAD(amount, 1) OVER (ORDER BY payment_date) AS next_payment_amount
FROM
    payments;
```

Copy

```
SELECT
    month,
    year,
    expenses,
    LEAD(expenses, 1) OVER (ORDER BY year, month) AS next_month_expenses
FROM
    financials;
```

Copy

```
WITH tmp AS (
  select count(*) as num_trips,
    DaysSinceEpoch
  from airlineStats
  GROUP BY DaysSinceEpoch
)

SELECT DaysSinceEpoch,
  num_trips,
  LEAD(num_trips, 2) OVER (
    ORDER BY DaysSinceEpoch
  ) AS previous_num_trips,
  num_trips - LEAD(num_trips, 2) OVER (
    ORDER BY DaysSinceEpoch
  ) AS difference
FROM tmp;
```

---

<a id="functions-aggregation-listagg"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/aggregation/listagg -->

<!-- page_index: 278 -->

# LISTAGG

- [Signature](#functions-aggregation-listagg--signature)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-aggregation-listagg--usage-examples)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select LISTAGG(DISTINCT league, ', ') AS value
from baseballStats
WHERE playerName = 'Barry Bonds'
```

Copy

```
SELECT Origin, Dest,
  LISTAGG(DISTINCT Carrier, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY Carrier) AS carriers
FROM airlineStats
GROUP BY Origin, Dest
```

Copy

```
SELECT teamID,
  LISTAGG(playerName, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY playerName) AS players
FROM baseballStats
GROUP BY teamID
```

---

<a id="functions-array-arraysoverlap"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/array/arraysoverlap -->

<!-- page_index: 330 -->

# arraysOverlap

- [Signature](#functions-array-arraysoverlap--signature)
- [Supported Types](#functions-array-arraysoverlap--supported-types)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-array-arraysoverlap--usage-examples)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT ARRAYS_OVERLAP(ARRAY[1, 2], ARRAY[3, 2]) AS hasOverlap
```

Copy

```
SELECT ARRAYS_OVERLAP(ARRAY['a', 'b'], ARRAY['x', 'y']) AS hasOverlap
```

Copy

```
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM myTable
WHERE ARRAYS_OVERLAP(longArrayCol, ARRAY[CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)])
```

---

<a id="functions-array-filtermv"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/array/filtermv -->

<!-- page_index: 334 -->

# filterMv

- [Signature](#functions-array-filtermv--signature)
- [Arguments](#functions-array-filtermv--arguments)
- [Supported Operators](#functions-array-filtermv--supported-operators)
- [Returns](#functions-array-filtermv--returns)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-array-filtermv--usage-examples)
- [Filter integers with comparison operators](#functions-array-filtermv--filter-integers-with-comparison-operators)
- [Filter strings with REGEXP\_LIKE](#functions-array-filtermv--filter-strings-with-regexp_like)
- [Filter with IN operator](#functions-array-filtermv--filter-with-in-operator)
- [Filter with aggregation in GROUP BY](#functions-array-filtermv--filter-with-aggregation-in-group-by)
- [Notes](#functions-array-filtermv--notes)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT filterMv(intArrayCol, 'v > 10 AND v < 50') AS filtered
FROM myTable
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT filterMv(stringArrayCol, 'REGEXP_LIKE(v, ''^/api/.*'')')
FROM myTable
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT filterMv(categoryCol, 'v IN (''A'', ''B'', ''C'')')
FROM myTable
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT filterMv(scoreCol, 'v BETWEEN 70 AND 90')
FROM myTable
LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT
  userId,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  filterMv(eventTypes, 'v = ''click''') as clickEvents
FROM events
GROUP BY userId
LIMIT 10
```

<a id="functions-funnel-funnelcount"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/funnel/funnelcount -->

<!-- page_index: 344 -->

# FUNNELCOUNT

- [Signature](#functions-funnel-funnelcount--signature)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-funnel-funnelcount--usage-examples)
- [Another Example](#functions-funnel-funnelcount--another-example)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select 
  FUNNEL_COUNT(
    STEPS(
      url = '/cart/add', 
      url = '/checkout/start', 
      url = '/checkout/confirmation'),
    CORRELATE_BY(user_id)
  ) AS counts
from user_log 
```

Copy

```
select 
   ARRAY[
     count_if(steps[1]),
     count_if(steps[1] and steps[2]),
     count_if(steps[1] and steps[2] and steps[3])
   ] as counts
 from (
   select 
     ARRAY[
       bool_or(url = '/cart/add'),
       bool_or(url = '/checkout/start'),
       bool_or(url = '/checkout/confirmation')
     ] as steps
   from user_log
   group by user_id
 )
```

Copy

```
select 
  FUNNEL_COUNT(
    STEPS(
      url = '/cart/add', 
      url = '/checkout/start', 
      url = '/checkout/confirmation'),
    CORRELATE_BY(user_id),
    SETTINGS('theta_sketch', 'nominalEntries=4096')
  ) AS counts
from user_log 
where url in ('/cart/add', '/checkout/start', '/checkout/confirmation')
```

Copy

```
select 
  FUNNEL_COUNT(
    STEPS(
      url = '/product/search',
      url = '/cart/add', 
      url = '/checkout/start', 
      url = '/checkout/confirmation'),
    CORRELATE_BY(user_id)
  ) AS counts
from user_log 
```

---

<a id="functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/funnel/funnelmaxstep-1 -->

<!-- page_index: 345 -->

# FunnelMaxStep

- [Syntax](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--syntax)
- [Return](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--return)
- [Arguments](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--arguments)
- [Optional Mode Supported](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--optional-mode-supported)
- [STRICT\_DEDUPLICATION](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--strict_deduplication)
- [STRICT\_ORDER](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--strict_order)
- [STRICT\_INCREASE](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--strict_increase)
- [KEEP\_ALL](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--keep_all)
- [Examples](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--examples)
- [Data Set](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-1--data-set)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT user_id,
  funnelMaxStep(
    ts,
    '1000000',
    4,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'cart_viewed',
    event_name = 'purchased'
  ) as steps
FROM clickstreamFunnel
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id
```

Copy

```
SELECT user_id,
  funnelMaxStep(
    ts,
    '100000',
    3,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'purchased',
    'strict_order'
  ) as steps
FROM clickstreamFunnel
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id
```

Copy

```
SELECT user_id,
  funnelMaxStep(
    ts,
    '100000',
    3,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'purchased',
    'strict_order',
    'keep_all'
  ) as steps
FROM clickstreamFunnel
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id
```

Copy

```
SELECT user_id,
  funnelMaxStep(
    ts,
    '1000000',
    3,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'purchased',
    'strict_order'
  ) as steps
FROM clickstreamFunnel
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id
```

<a id="functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/funnel/funnelmaxstep-2 -->

<!-- page_index: 346 -->

# FunnelMatchStep

- [Syntax](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--syntax)
- [Return](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--return)
- [Arguments](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--arguments)
- [Optional Mode Supported](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--optional-mode-supported)
- [STRICT\_DEDUPLICATION](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--strict_deduplication)
- [STRICT\_ORDER](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--strict_order)
- [STRICT\_INCREASE](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--strict_increase)
- [KEEP\_ALL](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--keep_all)
- [Examples](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--examples)
- [Data Set](#functions-funnel-funnelmaxstep-2--data-set)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT user_id,
  funnelMatchStep(
    ts,
    '1000000',
    4,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'cart_viewed',
    event_name = 'purchased'
  ) as matchedsteps
FROM clickstreamFunnel
GROUP BY user_id
ORDER BY user_id
```

Copy

```
WITH funnelMatchSteps AS (
  SELECT user_id,
  funnelMatchStep(
    ts,
    '1000000',
    4,
    event_name = 'screen_viewed',
    event_name = 'screen_clicked',
    event_name = 'cart_viewed',
    event_name = 'purchased'
  ) as matchedsteps
  FROM clickstreamFunnel
  GROUP BY user_id
)

SELECT sumArrayLong(matchedsteps) as funnelCounts FROM funnelMatchSteps 
```

<a id="functions-geospatial-stcontains"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/geospatial/stcontains -->

<!-- page_index: 355 -->

# ST_Contains

- [Signature](#functions-geospatial-stcontains--signature)
- [Warning](#functions-geospatial-stcontains--warning)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-geospatial-stcontains--usage-examples)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select count(*)
from meetupRsvp
WHERE ST_Contains(
         ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON ((
             -74.171737 40.607377, 
             -74.089339 40.753180, 
             -73.911498 40.769303, 
             -74.016555 40.604249,  
             -74.171737 40.607377))'),
	       toGeometry(location)
	     ) = 1
```

Copy

```
select count(*)
from meetupRsvp
WHERE ST_Contains(
         ST_GeogFromText('POLYGON ((
             -74.171737 40.607377, 
             -74.089339 40.753180, 
             -73.911498 40.769303, 
             -74.016555 40.604249,  
             -74.171737 40.607377))'), 
          location ) = 1
```

Copy

```
SET explainAskingServers=true;
explain plan for
SELECT event_id
FROM meetupRsvp
WHERE ST_Contains(
         ST_GeogFromText('POLYGON ((
             -74.171737 40.607377,
             -74.089339 40.753180,
             -73.911498 40.769303,
             -74.016555 40.604249,
             -74.171737 40.607377))'), location) = 1
limit 1000
```

Copy

```
Project(columns=[[event_id]])
   DocIdSet(maxDocs=[10000])
      InclusionFilterH3Index(predicate=[stcontains('84000000010000000500000000c0528afdbd2fa0d740444dbe878fabdac05285b7baecd0784044606833c6002ac0527a55fbb517a440446278854cdb7bc052810f3cb3e57540444d5807fed203c0528afdbd2fa0d740444dbe878fabda',location) = '1'], operator=[EQ])
```

<a id="functions-json-jsonextractindex"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/json/jsonextractindex -->

<!-- page_index: 367 -->

# jsonextractindex

- [Signature](#functions-json-jsonextractindex--signature)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-json-jsonextractindex--usage-examples)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.name', 'STRING') AS name
FROM githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.foo', 'STRING', 'dummyValue') AS name
FROM githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.name', 'STRING', 'dummyValue', '"$.id" < 10') AS name
FROM githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Copy

```
SELECT repo
FROM myTable 
WHERE id = 123
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.arrayField[*].f1', 'STRING', '[]') AS arrayValues
FROM myTable 
WHERE id = 123
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.arrayField[*].f1', 'STRING', '[]', '"$.arrField[*].f2" > 2') AS arrayValues
FROM myTable 
WHERE id = 123
```

Copy

```
SELECT id, jsonextractindex(repo, '$.arrayField[*].f1', 'STRING', '[]', '"$.arrField[*].nonExistant" > 99999') AS arrayValues
FROM myTable 
WHERE id = 123
```

---

<a id="functions-json-jsonextractkey"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/json/jsonextractkey -->

<!-- page_index: 368 -->

# jsonextractkey

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
-- Basic key extraction (existing functionality)
SELECT jsonExtractKey(repo, '$.*') FROM table

-- Extract keys with depth limit
SELECT jsonExtractKey(repo, '$..**', 'MAXDEPTH=2') FROM table

-- Extract keys in dot notation format
SELECT jsonExtractKey(repo, '$..**', 'DOTNOTATION=true') FROM table

-- Combined parameters
SELECT jsonExtractKey(repo, '$..**', 'MAXDEPTH=3;DOTNOTATION=true') FROM table
```

---

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/json/jsonextractscalar -->

<!-- page_index: 370 -->

# jsonextractscalar

- [Signature](#functions-json-jsonextractscalar--signature)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-json-jsonextractscalar--usage-examples)
- [Result typing and coercion](#functions-json-jsonextractscalar--result-typing-and-coercion)
- [Null Handling](#functions-json-jsonextractscalar--null-handling)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select id, jsonextractscalar(repo, '$.foo', 'STRING') AS name
from githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Copy

```
[
  {
    "message": "QueryExecutionError:\njava.lang.RuntimeException: Illegal Json Path: [$.foo], when reading [{\"id\":115911530,\"name\":\"LimeVista/Tapes\",\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/repos/LimeVista/Tapes\"}]\n\tat org.apache.pinot.core.operator.transform.function.JsonExtractScalarTransformFunction.transformToStringValuesSV(JsonExtractScalarTransformFunction.java:254)\n\tat org.apache.pinot.core.operator.docvalsets.TransformBlockValSet.getStringValuesSV(TransformBlockValSet.java:90)\n\tat org.apache.pinot.core.common.RowBasedBlockValueFetcher.createFetcher(RowBasedBlockValueFetcher.java:64)\n\tat org.apache.pinot.core.common.RowBasedBlockValueFetcher.<init>(RowBasedBlockValueFetcher.java:32)",
    "errorCode": 200
  }
]
```

Copy

```
select id, jsonextractscalar(repo, '$.foo', 'STRING', 'dummyValue') AS name
from githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Copy

```
select jsonextractscalar(payload, '$.prices', 'BIG_DECIMAL_ARRAY') as prices
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select jsonextractscalar(payload, '$.metadata', 'STRING') as metadata_json
from myTable
```

Copy

```
SET enableNullHandling = true;

select id, jsonextractscalar(repo, '$.missingPath', 'STRING', 'null') AS missingField
from githubEvents 
WHERE id = 7044874109
```

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
{"tableConfig":{"ingestionConfig":{"transformConfigs":[{"columnName":"name","transformFunction":"JSONPATHSTRING(data, '$.name')" },{"columnName":"age","transformFunction":"JSONPATHSTRING(data, '$.age')"}]}}}
```

- [bitShiftLeft](#functions-math-bitwise--bitshiftleft)
- [Signature](#functions-math-bitwise--signature-5)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-math-bitwise--usage-examples-5)
- [bitShiftRight](#functions-math-bitwise--bitshiftright)

- [Usage Examples](#functions-math-bitwise--usage-examples-6)
- [bitShiftRightUnsigned / bitShiftRightLogical](#functions-math-bitwise--bitshiftrightunsigned-bitshiftrightlogical)
- [Signature](#functions-math-bitwise--signature-7)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-math-bitwise--usage-examples-7)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT bitAnd(intCol, 3) AS masked
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitOr(8, 4) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitOr(intCol, 8) AS flags
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitXor(12, 10) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitXor(intCol, 1) AS toggled
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitNot(0) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitNot(intCol) AS inverted
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitMask(0) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitMask(3) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitMask(6) AS flags
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftLeft(1, 2) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftLeft(intCol, 2) AS shifted
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftRight(8, 2) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftRight(intCol, 1) AS shifted
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftRightUnsigned(-1, 1) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitShiftRightUnsigned(intCol, 1) AS shifted
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitExtract(12, 2) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT bitExtract(12, 0) AS value
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT id FROM myTable WHERE bitExtract(flags, 2) = 1
```

Copy

```
SELECT 
  id,
  bitAnd(flags, 15) AS lower_nibble,
  bitOr(flags, 128) AS set_high_bit,
  bitExtract(status, 3) AS is_active,
  bitShiftLeft(count, 2) AS quad_count
FROM myTable
WHERE bitExtract(flags, 2) = 1
```

<a id="functions-misc-issubnetof"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/misc/issubnetof -->

<!-- page_index: 412 -->

# isSubnetOf

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT count(*)
FROM myTable
WHERE isSubnetOf('192.168.0.1/24', ipAddressCol);

SELECT count(*)
FROM myTable
WHERE isSubnetOf('192.168.0.1/24', ipAddressCol)
OR isSubnetOf(ipPrefixCol, '7890:db8:113::8a2e:370:7336');
```

Copy

```
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN isSubnetOf('105.25.245.115/27', srcIPAddress) THEN 'case1'
        WHEN isSubnetOf('105.25.245.115/27', dstIPAddress) THEN 'case2'
        ELSE 'case3'
    END AS differentFlow
FROM myTable;
```

---

<a id="functions-sketch-avgvalueintegersumtuplesketch"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/sketch/avgvalueintegersumtuplesketch -->

<!-- page_index: 413 -->

# AVGVALUEINTEGERSUMTUPLESKETCH

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select avgValueIntegerSumTupleSketch(playerHomeRuns) as value
from baseballStats 
```

Copy

```
select avgValueIntegerSumTupleSketch(playerHomeRuns, 'nominalEntries=4096;accumulatorThreshold=10') as value
from baseballStats 
```

<a id="functions-sketch-distinctcountcpcsketch"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/sketch/distinctcountcpcsketch -->

<!-- page_index: 414 -->

# DISTINCTCOUNTCPCSKETCH

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select
  getCpcSketchEstimate(
    cpcSketchUnion(
	    distinctCountRawCpcSketch(teamID) FILTER (WHERE yearID = 2004),
	    distinctCountRawCpcSketch(teamID) FILTER (WHERE league = 'NL')
    )
  ) AS value
from baseballStats
```

---

Copy

```
select
  cpcSketchUnion(
	  distinctCountRawCpcSketch(teamID) FILTER (WHERE yearID = 2004),
	  distinctCountRawCpcSketch(teamID) FILTER (WHERE league = 'NL')
  ) AS value
from baseballStats
```

<a id="functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/string/add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs -->

<!-- page_index: 433 -->

# Add Prefix, Suffix & Ngram UDFs

- [Context](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--context)
- [What is N-gram](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--what-is-n-gram)
- [When to Use N-gram](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--when-to-use-n-gram)
- [How to Make Wildcards Fast](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--how-to-make-wildcards-fast)
- [Function Parameters](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--function-parameters)
- [Usage Examples](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--usage-examples)
- [Prefix Operations](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--prefix-operations)
- [Suffix Operations](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--suffix-operations)
- [N-gram Generation](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--n-gram-generation)
- [How to Use N-gram](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--how-to-use-n-gram)
- [Simulated N-gram Approach](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--simulated-n-gram-approach)
- [Implementation Steps](#functions-string-add-prefix-suffix-ngram-udfs--implementation-steps)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT organizationUUID, confirmedEmployeeCount, name
FROM rta.rta.u4b_organizations
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
  AND (IN_SERIALIZED_LIST(entityTypes, 'org:u4b:organization'))
  AND (TEXT_MATCH(name, '/.*pacific.*/ AND /.*equity.*/')
       OR TEXT_MATCH(profileName, '/.*pacific.*/ AND /.*equity.*/'))
ORDER BY confirmedEmployeeCount DESC
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 10
```

Copy

```
SELECT prefixes('data', 3) AS result
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT prefixesWithPrefix('data', 3, '^') AS result
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT suffixes('data', 3) AS result
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT suffixesWithSuffix('data', 3, '$') AS result
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
{"tableName": "myTable","tableType": "OFFLINE","ingestionConfig": {"transformationConfigs": [{"columnName": "content_bigrams","transformFunction": "uniqueNgrams(content, 2)" },{"columnName": "content_ngrams","transformFunction": "uniqueNgrams(content, 2, 4)"}]}}
```

Copy

```
SELECT uniqueNgrams('Apache pinot', 2) AS bigrams
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT uniqueNgrams('data', 2, 4) AS ngrams
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT uniqueNgramsMV(ARRAY['ab', 'bc'], 2) AS ngrams
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT uniqueNgramsMV(ARRAY['abcd'], 1, 2) AS ngrams
FROM myTable
```

Copy

```
-- Traditional approach (slow)
SELECT * FROM T WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(field, '*pino.*')

-- Optimized approach with n-gram prefiltering
SELECT * FROM T
WHERE ngram = 'pin' AND ngram = 'ino' AND ngram = 'not'
  AND REGEXP_LIKE(field, '*pino.*')
```

Copy

```
-- Traditional approach for short strings
SELECT * FROM T WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(field, '*pi.*')

-- Optimized approach (no validation needed when search string ≤ ngram length)
SELECT * FROM T WHERE ngram = 'pi'
```

---

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/string/regexpextract -->

<!-- page_index: 444 -->

# regexpExtract

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select regexpExtract('foo bar baz', '(\w+) (\w+)', 2) AS value
from ignoreMe
```

Copy

```
select regexpExtract('foo123', 'bar', 0, 'defaultValue') AS value
from ignoreMe
```

<!-- page_index: 445 -->

# regexpReplace

- [Signature](#functions-string-regexpreplace--signature)
- [inputStr](#functions-string-regexpreplace--inputstr)
- [matchRegexp](#functions-string-regexpreplace--matchregexp)
- [replaceRegexp](#functions-string-regexpreplace--replaceregexp)

- [Example 2](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-2)
- [Example 3](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-3)
- [Example 4](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-4)
- [Example 5](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-5)
- [Example 6](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-6)
- [Example 7](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-7)
- [Example 8](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-8)
- [Example 9](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-9)
- [Example 10](#functions-string-regexpreplace--example-10)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('foo', 'o', 'x') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('foo123', '[0-9]+', 'bar') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('foo123', '[^0-9]+', 'bar') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('foo', '(.)', '$1 ') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('Pinot is  blazing  fast', '( ){2,}', ' ') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('11234567898','(\\d)(\\d{3})(\\d{3})(\\d{4})', '$1-($2) $3-$4') AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('healthy, wealthy, stealthy and wise','\\w+thy', 'something', 4)  AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('healthy, wealthy, stealthy and wise','\\w+thy', 'something', 0, 2)  AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
select regexpReplace('healthy, wealthy, stealthy and wise','\\w+THY', 'something', 0, 0, 'i')  AS value
from myTable
```

Copy

```
SELECT col1, col2
FROM myTable
WHERE regexpReplace(stateCode, '[VC]A', 'TEST') = 'TEST'
```

Copy

```
SELECT count(*)
FROM myTable
WHERE contains(regexpReplace(stateCode, '(C)(A)', '$1TEST$2'), 'CTESTA')
```

<a id="functions-window-dense_rank"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/window/dense_rank -->

<!-- page_index: 459 -->

# DENSE_RANK

- [Signature](#functions-window-dense_rank--signature)
- [Usage Notes](#functions-window-dense_rank--usage-notes)
- [Examples](#functions-window-dense_rank--examples)
- [Related Pages](#functions-window-dense_rank--related-pages)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
    department,
    employee_name,
    salary,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY department
        ORDER BY salary DESC
    ) AS salary_rank
FROM employees;
```

---

Copy

```
SELECT
    department,
    employee_name,
    salary,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY department
        ORDER BY salary DESC
    ) AS salary_rank
FROM employees;
```

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/functions/window/row_number -->

<!-- page_index: 461 -->

# ROW_NUMBER

- [Signature](#functions-window-row_number--signature)
- [Usage Notes](#functions-window-row_number--usage-notes)
- [Examples](#functions-window-row_number--examples)
- [Related Pages](#functions-window-row_number--related-pages)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
SELECT
    customer_id,
    payment_date,
    amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY customer_id
        ORDER BY payment_date
    ) AS payment_number
FROM payment;
```

<a id="operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/operate-pinot/deployment/advanced-pinot-setup -->

<!-- page_index: 463 -->

# Advanced Pinot Setup

- [Start Pinot components (scripts or docker images)](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--start-pinot-components-scripts-or-docker-images)
- [Start Pinot Using Config Files](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--start-pinot-using-config-files)
- [Pinot Controller](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--pinot-controller)
- [Pinot Server](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--pinot-server)
- [Create and Configure table](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--create-and-configure-table)
- [Batch Table Creation](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--batch-table-creation)
- [Automatically add an inverted index to your batch table](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--automatically-add-an-inverted-index-to-your-batch-table)
- [Streaming Table Creation](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--streaming-table-creation)
- [Use sortedColumn with streaming tables](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--use-sortedcolumn-with-streaming-tables)
- [Load Data](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--load-data)
- [Load Data in Batch](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--load-data-in-batch)
- [Load Data in Streaming](#operate-pinot-deployment-advanced-pinot-setup--load-data-in-streaming)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
export PINOT_VERSION=1.4.0 #set to the Pinot version you have installed
export PINOT_IMAGE=apachepinot/pinot:${PINOT_VERSION}
docker pull ${PINOT_IMAGE}
```

Copy

```
docker network create -d bridge pinot-demo
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name  pinot-zookeeper \
    --restart always \
    -p 2181:2181 \
    -d zookeeper:3.9.5
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network pinot-demo --name=zkui \
    -p 9090:9090 \
    -e ZK_SERVER=pinot-zookeeper:2181 \
    -d qnib/plain-zkui:latest
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-controller \
    -p 9000:9000 \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartController \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-broker \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartBroker \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
export PINOT_IMAGE=apachepinot/pinot:latest
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-server \
    -d ${PINOT_IMAGE} StartServer \
    -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181
```

Copy

```
docker container ls -a
```

Copy

```
CONTAINER ID        IMAGE                              COMMAND                  CREATED              STATUS                PORTS                                                  NAMES
9e80c3fcd29b        apachepinot/pinot:latest   "./bin/pinot-admin.s…"   18 seconds ago       Up 17 seconds         8096-8099/tcp, 9000/tcp                                pinot-server
f4c42a5865c7        apachepinot/pinot:latest   "./bin/pinot-admin.s…"   21 seconds ago       Up 21 seconds         8096-8099/tcp, 9000/tcp                                pinot-broker
a413b0013806        apachepinot/pinot:latest   "./bin/pinot-admin.s…"   26 seconds ago       Up 25 seconds         8096-8099/tcp, 0.0.0.0:9000->9000/tcp                  pinot-controller
9d3b9c4d454b        zookeeper:3.9.5                  "/docker-entrypoint.…"   About a minute ago   Up About a minute     2888/tcp, 3888/tcp, 0.0.0.0:2181->2181/tcp, 8080/tcp   pinot-zookeeper
```

Copy

```
$ export PINOT_VERSION=1.4.0 #set to the Pinot version you have installed
$ tar -xvf apache-pinot-${PINOT_VERSION}-bin.tar.gz

$ cd apache-pinot-${PINOT_VERSION}-bin
$ ls DISCLAIMER LICENSE NOTICE bin conf lib licenses query_console sample_data

$ PINOT_INSTALL_DIR=`pwd`
```

Copy

```
cd apache-pinot-${PINOT_VERSION}-bin
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartZookeeper
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartController \
    -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartBroker \
    -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartServer \
    -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
controller.helix.cluster.name=pinot-quickstart
controller.port=9000
controller.vip.host=pinot-controller
controller.vip.port=9000
controller.data.dir=/var/pinot/controller/data
controller.zk.str=pinot-zookeeper:2181
pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartController -configFileName config/pinot-controller.conf
```

Copy

```
pinot.broker.client.queryPort=8099
pinot.broker.routing.table.builder.class=random
pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartBroker -clusterName pinot-quickstart -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181 -configFileName config/pinot-broker.conf
```

Copy

```
pinot.server.netty.port=8098
pinot.server.adminapi.port=8097
pinot.server.instance.dataDir=/var/pinot/server/data/index
pinot.server.instance.segmentTarDir=/var/pinot/server/data/segment
pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh StartServer -clusterName pinot-quickstart -zkAddress pinot-zookeeper:2181 -configFileName config/pinot-server.conf
```

Copy

```
docker run \
    --network=pinot-demo \
    --name pinot-batch-table-creation \
    ${PINOT_IMAGE} AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json \
    -controllerHost pinot-controller \
    -controllerPort 9000 \
    -exec
```

Copy

```
Executing command: AddTable -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json -controllerHost pinot-controller -controllerPort 9000 -exec
Sending request: http://pinot-controller:9000/schemas to controller: a413b0013806, version: Unknown
{"status":"Table airlineStats_OFFLINE succesfully added"}
```

Copy

```
bin/pinot-admin.sh AddTable \
    -schemaFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_schema.json \
    -tableConfigFile examples/batch/airlineStats/airlineStats_offline_table_config.json \
    -exec
```

# Command-Line Interface (CLI)

- [Add Schema](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--add-schema)
- [Add Table](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--add-table)
- [Add Tenant](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--add-tenant)
- [Check Offline Segment Intervals](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--check-offline-segment-intervals)
- [Change Num Replicas](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--change-num-replicas)
- [Change Table State](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--change-table-state)
- [Create Segment](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--create-segment)
- [Convert Pinot Segment](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--convert-pinot-segment)
- [Delete Cluster](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--delete-cluster)
- [Launch Data Ingestion Job](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--launch-data-ingestion-job)
- [Merge/Rollup Segments](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--merge-rollup-segments)
- [Move Replica Group](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--move-replica-group)
- [Operate Cluster Config](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--operate-cluster-config)
- [Post Query](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--post-query)
- [Rebalance Table](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--rebalance-table)
- [Start Broker](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--start-broker)
- [Start Controller](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--start-controller)
- [Start Server](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--start-server)
- [Start Service Manager](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--start-service-manager)
- [Show Cluster Info](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--show-cluster-info)
- [Stop Process](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--stop-process)
- [Upload Segments](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--upload-segments)
- [Validate Config](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--validate-config)
- [Validate Segment](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--validate-segment)
- [Verify Cluster State](#operate-pinot-deployment-cli--verify-cluster-state)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh AddTenant -name myTenant -role SERVER -instanceCount 10 -controllerHost localhost -controllerPort 9000 -exec
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh CheckOfflineSegmentIntervals -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -tableName myTable
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ChangeNumReplicas -tableName myTable -clusterName PinotCluster -zkAddress localhost:2181 -exec
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ChangeTableState -tableName myTable -state disable -controllerHost localhost -controllerPort 9000 -exec
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh CreateSegment -dataDir /path/to/data/dir -format CSV -outDir /path/to/output/dir -overwrite -tableConfigFile /path/to/table.json -schemaConfigFile /path/to/schema.json
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ConvertPinotSegment -dataDir /path/to/data/dir -outputDir /path/to/output/dir -outputFormat CSV -overwrite -csvDelimiter ,
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh DeleteCluster -clusterName PinotCluster -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh LaunchDataIngestionJob -jobSpecFile /path/to/job_spec.json -propertyFile /path/to/job.properties -values dt=2020-08-10 hour=15
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh SegmentProcessorFramework -segmentProcessorFrameworkSpec /path/to/framework_spec.json
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh MoveReplicaGroup -zkHost localhost:2181 -cluster PinotCluster -srcHosts host1,host2 -destHostsFile /path/to/destination/file -tableName myTable -exec
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh OperateClusterConfig -controllerHost localhost -controllerPort 9000 -operation ADD -config pinot.broker.enable.query.limit.override=1
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh PostQuery -brokerHost localhost -brokerPort 8000 -query "SELECT * FROM myTable"
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh RebalanceTable -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -tableName myTable -reassignInstances -includeConsuming -downtime  
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh StartBroker -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -configFileName /path/to/broker.conf
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh StartController -controllerMode helix_only -dataDir /path/to/data/dir -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -configFileName /path/to/controller.conf
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh StartServer -dataDir /path/to/data/dir -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -configFileName /path/to/server.conf
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh StartServiceManager -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -bootstrapServices CONTROLLER BROKER -bootstrapConfigPaths /path/to/controller.conf /path/to/broker.conf 
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ShowClusterInfo -clusterName PinotCluster -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh StopProcess -controller -broker -server
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh UploadSegment -controllerHost localhost -controllerPort 9000 -segmentDir /path/to/local/dir -tableName myTable
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ValidateConfig -clusterName PinotCluster -zkAddress localhost:2181 -tableConfig -tableName mytable myTable2 -schema -schemaNames myschema myschema2
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh ValidateSegment -tablePrefix myTable -clusterName PinotCluster -zkAddress localhost:2181
```

Copy

```
pinot-admin.sh VerifyClusterState -zkAddress localhost:2181 -clusterName PinotCluster -tableName myTable -timeoutSec 10
```

<a id="operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers"></a>

<!-- source_url: https://docs.pinot.apache.org/operate-pinot/deployment/server-startup-status-checkers -->

<!-- page_index: 467 -->

# Server Startup Status Checkers

- [Overview](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--overview)
- [No Consuming Status Check (Default Behavior)](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--no-consuming-status-check-default-behavior)
- [Static Consumption Wait](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--static-consumption-wait)
- [Offset Based Segment Checker](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--offset-based-segment-checker)
- [Freshness Based Segment Checker](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--freshness-based-segment-checker)
- [Recommend Configurations](#operate-pinot-deployment-server-startup-status-checkers--recommend-configurations)

Was this helpful?

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

<svg fill="none" height="18" viewbox="0 0 18 18" width="18" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle></circle><path></path></svg>

Copy

```
# this is the default, 10 minutes.
pinot.server.startup.timeoutMs=600000
# this is the default. you do not have to specify this.
pinot.server.startup.enableServiceStatusCheck=true
# the default is 0, and the server will not wait
pinot.server.starter.realtimeConsumptionCatchupWaitMs=60000
```

Copy

```
# this is the default, 10 minutes.
pinot.server.startup.timeoutMs=600000
# this is the default. you do not have to specify this.
pinot.server.startup.enableServiceStatusCheck=true
# the default is 0, and the server will not wait
pinot.server.starter.realtimeConsumptionCatchupWaitMs=60000
# this is disabled by default.
pinot.server.starter.enableRealtimeOffsetBasedConsumptionStatusChecker=true
```

Copy

```
# this is the default, 10 minutes.
pinot.server.startup.timeoutMs=600000

# this is the default. you do not have to specify this.
pinot.server.startup.enableServiceStatusCheck=true

# the default is 0, and the server will not wait
pinot.server.starter.realtimeConsumptionCatchupWaitMs=60000

# this is disabled by default.
pinot.server.starter.enableRealtimeFreshnessBasedConsumptionStatusChecker=true

# this is the default. The server wants events to be no more than 10
# seconds old.
pinot.server.starter.realtimeMinFreshnessMs=10000

# this is the default. the server will keep waiting for segments to catch up
# even if they are not making progress.
pinot.server.starter.realtimeFreshnessIdleTimeoutMs=0

# the server will still start and serve queries if it not caught up
pinot.server.starter.exitServerOnStartupStatusFailure=false
```

Copy

```
pinot.server.startup.enableServiceStatusCheck=true
pinot.server.starter.enableRealtimeFreshnessBasedConsumptionStatusChecker=true

# these should be set to your environment based on how long
# catching up typically takes.
pinot.server.startup.timeoutMs=<your_timeout_ms>
pinot.server.starter.realtimeConsumptionCatchupWaitMs=<your_timeout_ms>
pinot.server.starter.realtimeMinFreshnessMs=<your_desired_freshness>

pinot.server.starter.realtimeFreshnessIdleTimeoutMs=1000
pinot.server.startup.exitOnServiceStatusCheckFailure=false
```

Copy

```
pinot.server.startup.enableServiceStatusCheck=true
pinot.server.starter.enableRealtimeFreshnessBasedConsumptionStatusChecker=true

# these should be set to your environment based on how long
# catching up typically takes.
pinot.server.startup.timeoutMs=<your_timeout_ms>
pinot.server.starter.realtimeConsumptionCatchupWaitMs=<your_timeout_ms>
pinot.server.starter.realtimeMinFreshnessMs=<your_desired_freshness>

pinot.server.starter.realtimeFreshnessIdleTimeoutMs=0
pinot.server.startup.exitOnServiceStatusCheckFailure=true
```

Was this helpful?

Copy

```
# All pods running kubectl get pods -n pinot-quickstart

# Controller API responds kubectl port-forward svc/pinot-controller 9000:9000 -n pinot-quickstart curl http://localhost:9000/health

# Broker query endpoint responds kubectl port-forward svc/pinot-broker 8099:8099 -n pinot-quickstart curl http://localhost:8099/health
```

Copy

```
# Update Helm repository helm repo update pinot

# For source deployments, fetch dependencies helm dependency build

# Upgrade your release helm upgrade pinot pinot/pinot -n pinot-quickstart -f values.yaml
```

Copy

```
zookeeper:
  enabled: false
  urlOverride: "zk-0.zk-svc:2181,zk-1.zk-svc:2181,zk-2.zk-svc:2181/pinot"
```

Copy

```
helm repo update
helm upgrade pinot pinot/pinot -n pinot-quickstart --set zookeeper.enabled=true
kubectl delete statefulset -n pinot-quickstart pinot-zookeeper
```

Copy

```
NAMESPACE=pinot-quickstart
RELEASE=pinot
kubectl cp ${NAMESPACE}/${RELEASE}-zookeeper-0:/bitnami/zookeeper/data ./zk-data-backup
```

Copy

```
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-controller -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=0
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-broker -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=0
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-server -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=0
```

Copy

```
kubectl delete statefulset pinot-zookeeper -n pinot-quickstart --cascade=orphan
```

Copy

```
helm repo update
helm upgrade pinot pinot/pinot -n pinot-quickstart -f values.yaml
```

Copy

```
kubectl rollout status statefulset/pinot-zookeeper -n pinot-quickstart
```

Copy

```
kubectl scale statefulset/${RELEASE}-zookeeper --replicas=0 -n ${NAMESPACE}
```

Copy

```
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -n ${NAMESPACE} -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: zk-data-restore
spec:
  containers:
  - name: restore
    image: busybox
    command: ["sleep", "3600"]
    volumeMounts:
    - name: data
      mountPath: /data
    - name: datalog
      mountPath: /datalog
  volumes:
  - name: data
    persistentVolumeClaim:
      claimName: data-${RELEASE}-zookeeper-0
  - name: datalog
    persistentVolumeClaim:
      claimName: datalog-${RELEASE}-zookeeper-0
  restartPolicy: Never
EOF
kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod/zk-data-restore -n ${NAMESPACE} --timeout=10m
```

Copy

```
kubectl cp ./zk-data-backup/. ${NAMESPACE}/zk-data-restore:/data
kubectl exec -n ${NAMESPACE} zk-data-restore -- \
  sh -c 'mkdir -p /datalog/version-2 && mv /data/version-2/log.* /datalog/version-2/'
```

Copy

```
kubectl delete pod zk-data-restore -n ${NAMESPACE}
kubectl scale statefulset/${RELEASE}-zookeeper --replicas=1 -n ${NAMESPACE}
kubectl rollout status statefulset/${RELEASE}-zookeeper -n ${NAMESPACE}
```

Copy

```
kubectl exec -n ${NAMESPACE} ${RELEASE}-zookeeper-0 -- \
  bash -c 'echo ruok | nc localhost 2181'
# Expected output: imok
```

Copy

```
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-controller -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=3
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-broker -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=3
kubectl scale statefulset pinot-server -n pinot-quickstart --replicas=4
kubectl exec -n pinot-quickstart pinot-controller-0 -- \
  curl -s http://localhost:9000/instances
```

Copy

```
zookeeper:
  enabled: false
  urlOverride: "your-zk-ensemble:2181/pinot"
```

Copy

```
controller:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      controller.task.scheduler.enabled=true
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.class.s3=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.S3PinotFS
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.s3.region=us-east-1
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,s3
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.s3.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher

server:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      pinot.server.instance.realtime.alloc.offheap=true
      pinot.server.storage.factory.class.s3=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.S3PinotFS
      pinot.server.storage.factory.s3.region=us-east-1
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,s3
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.s3.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher
```

Copy

```
controller:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      controller.task.scheduler.enabled=true
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.class.gs=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.GcsPinotFS
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.gs.projectId=my-gcp-project
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,gs
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.gs.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher

server:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      pinot.server.instance.realtime.alloc.offheap=true
      pinot.server.storage.factory.class.gs=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.GcsPinotFS
      pinot.server.storage.factory.gs.projectId=my-gcp-project
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,gs
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.gs.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher
```

Copy

```
controller:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      controller.task.scheduler.enabled=true
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.class.adl=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.ADLSGen2PinotFS
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.adl.accountName=mystorageaccount
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.adl.accessKey=myaccesskey
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.adl.fileSystemName=pinot-deepstore
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,adl
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.adl.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher

server:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      pinot.server.instance.realtime.alloc.offheap=true
      pinot.server.storage.factory.class.adl=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.ADLSGen2PinotFS
      pinot.server.storage.factory.adl.accountName=mystorageaccount
      pinot.server.storage.factory.adl.accessKey=myaccesskey
      pinot.server.storage.factory.adl.fileSystemName=pinot-deepstore
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,adl
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.adl.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher
```

Copy

```
controller:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      controller.task.scheduler.enabled=true
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.class.hdfs=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.HadoopPinotFS
      pinot.controller.storage.factory.hdfs.hadoop.conf.path=/opt/pinot/etc/hadoop/conf
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,hdfs
      pinot.controller.segment.fetcher.hdfs.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher

server:
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      pinot.server.instance.realtime.alloc.offheap=true
      pinot.server.storage.factory.class.hdfs=org.apache.pinot.plugin.filesystem.HadoopPinotFS
      pinot.server.storage.factory.hdfs.hadoop.conf.path=/opt/pinot/etc/hadoop/conf
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.protocols=file,http,hdfs
      pinot.server.segment.fetcher.hdfs.class=org.apache.pinot.common.utils.fetcher.PinotFSSegmentFetcher
```

Copy

```
controller:
  configureControllerPort: false
  persistence:
    extraVolumes:
      - name: tls-certs
        secret:
          secretName: pinot-tls
    extraVolumeMounts:
      - name: tls-certs
        mountPath: /opt/pinot/tls
        readOnly: true
  extra:
    configs: |-
      pinot.set.instance.id.to.hostname=true
      controller.access.protocols=https
      controller.access.protocols.https.port=9443
      pinot.controller.tls.keystore.path=/opt/pinot/tls/keystore.jks
      pinot.controller.tls.keystore.password=changeit
      pinot.controller.tls.truststore.path=/opt/pinot/tls/truststore.jks
      pinot.controller.tls.truststore.password=changeit
```

Copy

```
pinotAuth:
  enabled: true
  configs:
    - access.control.principals=admin,user
    - access.control.principals.admin.password=verysecret
    - access.control.principals.user.password=secret
    - access.control.principals.user.tables=baseballStats
    - access.control.principals.user.permissions=READ
```

Copy

```
controller:
  podAnnotations:
    prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
    prometheus.io/port: "9000"
    prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"

broker:
  podAnnotations:
    prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
    prometheus.io/port: "8099"
    prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"

server:
  podAnnotations:
    prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
    prometheus.io/port: "8097"
    prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
```

Copy

```
image:
  tag: "1.0.0"        # Pin to a specific release
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

controller:
  replicaCount: 3
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 1
      memory: 2Gi
    limits:
      cpu: 2
      memory: 4Gi
  jvmOpts: "-XX:ActiveProcessorCount=2 -Xms1G -Xmx3G -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200"
  persistence:
    size: 10G
    storageClass: "gp2"   # Adjust for your cloud
  pdb:
    enabled: true
    maxUnavailable: 1

broker:
  replicaCount: 3
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 2
      memory: 4Gi
    limits:
      cpu: 4
      memory: 8Gi
  jvmOpts: "-XX:ActiveProcessorCount=4 -Xms2G -Xmx6G -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200"
  probes:
    livenessEnabled: true
    readinessEnabled: true
  pdb:
    enabled: true
    maxUnavailable: 1

server:
  replicaCount: 4
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 4
      memory: 16Gi
    limits:
      cpu: 8
      memory: 32Gi
  jvmOpts: "-Xms8G -Xmx24G -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize=8G"
  persistence:
    size: 100G
    storageClass: "gp2"
  probes:
    livenessEnabled: true
    readinessEnabled: true
    startupEnabled: true
  pdb:
    enabled: true
    maxUnavailable: 1

zookeeper:
  replicaCount: 3
  persistence:
    size: 20Gi
    storageClass: "gp2"
```

Copy

```
helm install pinot pinot/pinot \
    -n pinot-quickstart \
    --set cluster.name=pinot-prod \
    --set server.replicaCount=4 \
    --set server.persistence.size=100G
```

Copy

```
helm install pinot pinot/pinot \
    -n pinot-quickstart \
    -f production-values.yaml
```

Copy

```
image:
  tag: "1.1.0"   # Target version
```

Copy

```
helm upgrade pinot pinot/pinot -n pinot-quickstart -f values.yaml --dry-run --debug
```

Copy

```
helm upgrade pinot pinot/pinot -n pinot-quickstart -f values.yaml
```

Copy

```
kubectl rollout status statefulset/pinot-controller -n pinot-quickstart
kubectl rollout status statefulset/pinot-broker -n pinot-quickstart
kubectl rollout status statefulset/pinot-server -n pinot-quickstart
```

Copy

```
helm rollback pinot -n pinot-quickstart
```
